4.1 PheCodes
```{r}
#Imaging incidence
Imaging_PheCode_dates_df = merge(Imaging_date, PheCode_dates, by='eid')
Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[] <- lapply(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df, as.Date)
Imaging_PheCode_dates_df$eid = as.numeric(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df$eid)

pre_diff_time = Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[,-1]

time_diff_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(pre_diff_time) - 1, nrow = nrow(pre_diff_time)))
colnames(time_diff_df) <- paste0("Time_diff_", 1:(ncol(pre_diff_time)-1))

# Calculate the difference in time between date1 column and every 1852 column of dates
for (i in 2:ncol(pre_diff_time)) {
  time_diff_df[, i-1] <- as.numeric(difftime(pre_diff_time$Imaging_date, pre_diff_time[[i]], units = "days"))
}

# Combine the original data frame with the time differences data frame
result_df <- cbind(pre_diff_time, time_diff_df)

result_df = result_df[,c(1,1854:3705)]
result_df = cbind(Imaging_PheCode_dates_df[,1], result_df)
colnames(result_df)[1] = "eid"
result_df = result_df[,-2]

PheWAS_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, PheWAS_final_table, by="eid")
PheWAS_imaging_df = PheWAS_imaging_df[,-2]


merged_result_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(PheWAS_imaging_df) + ncol(result_df), nrow = nrow(PheWAS_imaging_df)))

colnames(merged_result_df) <- c(rep(names(PheWAS_imaging_df), each = 1), rep(names(PheWAS_imaging_df), each = 1))

for (i in 1:ncol(merged_result_df)) {
  if (i %% 2 != 0) {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- PheWAS_imaging_df[, (i + 1) %/% 2]
  } else {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- result_df[, i %/% 2]
  }
}

merged_result_df = merged_result_df[,-2]

#-------------------------------------------------------------

df1 = PheWAS_imaging_df
df2 = result_df

new_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(df1) + ncol(df2), nrow = nrow(df1)))

# Assign alternating columns from df1 and df2 to the new data frame
for (i in 1:ncol(df1)) {
  new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- df1[, i]
  new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
}

# If df1 and df2 have different number of columns, fill in the remaining columns
if (ncol(df1) < ncol(df2)) {
  for (i in (ncol(df1) + 1):ncol(df2)) {
    new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- rep(NA, nrow(df1))
    new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
  }
}

# Set column names for the new data frame
colnames(new_df) <- c(sapply(1:ncol(df1), function(i) c(colnames(df1)[i], colnames(df2)[i])))

new_df = new_df[,-2]

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------

df = PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined

for (k in 2:3704) {
  co <- df[, k]
  mt <- df[, k + 1]  # Assuming the adjacent column is the next column
  
  # Find indices where co is TRUE and mt is NA or >= -182 # DATE OF IMAGING AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  idx <- which(co == TRUE & (is.na(mt) | mt >= -182)) # DATE OF IMAGING AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  
  # Update cells in df where the condition is met
  df[idx, k] <- NA
}

Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined = df

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Incident_PheWAS_df = Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined

# Create a sequence of column indices to remove
columns_to_remove <- seq(3, ncol(Incident_PheWAS_df), by = 2)

# Remove the specified columns from the data frame
Incident_PheWAS_df <- Incident_PheWAS_df[, -columns_to_remove]

Incident_PheWAS_df = Incident_PheWAS_df[,-1854]
export(Incident_PheWAS_df, "Incident_PheWAS_df.csv")


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#Admission incidence
Admission_PheCode_dates_df <- merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheCode_dates, by = 'eid')
Admission_PheCode_dates_df[] <- lapply(Admission_PheCode_dates_df, as.Date)
Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid <- as.numeric(Admission_PheCode_dates_df$eid)

# Prepare to calculate time differences
pre_diff_time <- Admission_PheCode_dates_df[,-1]

# Initialize time_diff_df
time_diff_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(pre_diff_time), nrow = nrow(pre_diff_time)))
colnames(time_diff_df) <- paste0("Time_diff_", 1:ncol(pre_diff_time))

# Calculate the difference in time between the first column and others
for (i in 1:ncol(pre_diff_time)) {
  time_diff_df[, i] <- as.numeric(difftime(pre_diff_time[[1]], pre_diff_time[[i]], units = "days"))
}

# Combine the original data frame with the time differences data frame
result_df <- cbind(Admission_PheCode_dates_df, time_diff_df)
result_df = result_df[,-2]

result_df = result_df[,c(1,1854:3706)]
result_df = cbind(Admission_PheCode_dates_df[,1], result_df)
colnames(result_df)[1] = "eid"
result_df = result_df[,-2]
result_df = result_df[,-1]

PheWAS_admission_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[1:2], PheWAS_final_table, by="eid")
PheWAS_admission_df = PheWAS_admission_df[,-2]

merged_result_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(PheWAS_admission_df) + ncol(result_df), nrow = nrow(PheWAS_admission_df)))

colnames(merged_result_df) <- c(rep(names(PheWAS_admission_df), each = 1), rep(names(PheWAS_admission_df), each = 1))

for (i in 1:ncol(merged_result_df)) {
  if (i %% 2 != 0) {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- PheWAS_admission_df[, (i + 1) %/% 2]
  } else {
    merged_result_df[, i] <- result_df[, i %/% 2]
  }
}

merged_result_df = merged_result_df[,-2]

#-------------------------------------------------------------

df1 = PheWAS_admission_df
df2 = result_df

new_df <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = ncol(df1) + ncol(df2), nrow = nrow(df1)))

# Assign alternating columns from df1 and df2 to the new data frame
for (i in 1:ncol(df1)) {
  new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- df1[, i]
  new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
}

# If df1 and df2 have different number of columns, fill in the remaining columns
if (ncol(df1) < ncol(df2)) {
  for (i in (ncol(df1) + 1):ncol(df2)) {
    new_df[, 2*i - 1] <- rep(NA, nrow(df1))
    new_df[, 2*i] <- df2[, i]
  }
}

# Set column names for the new data frame
colnames(new_df) <- c(sapply(1:ncol(df1), function(i) c(colnames(df1)[i], colnames(df2)[i])))

new_df = new_df[,-2]

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------

df = new_df

for (k in 2:3704) {
  co <- df[, k]
  mt <- df[, k + 1]  # Assuming the adjacent column is the next column
  
  # Find indices where co is TRUE and mt is NA or >= -182 # DATE OF ADMISSION AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  idx <- which(co == TRUE & (is.na(mt) | mt >= -182)) # DATE OF ADMISSION AND PHECODE DIAGNOSIS FLIPPED
  
  # Update cells in df where the condition is met
  df[idx, k] <- NA
}

Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined_admission = df

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Incident_PheWAS_admission_df = Incident_PheWAS_code_time_diff_combined_admission

# Create a sequence of column indices to remove
columns_to_remove <- seq(3, ncol(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df), by = 2)

# Remove the specified columns from the data frame
Incident_PheWAS_admission_df <- Incident_PheWAS_admission_df[, -columns_to_remove]

#Positive control check
Incident_PheWAS_admission_T2D_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df[,c('eid', '250.2')], PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')
Incident_PheWAS_admission_T2D_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_admission_T2D_df, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')

export(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, "Incident_PheWAS_admission_df.csv")

#Whole cohort
count(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df$`250.2`)
count(PheWAS_final_table$`250.2`)
#32,748 total admission-incident T2D diagnoses 
#44,628 total prevalent cases of T2D

#Imaging cohort
count(Incident_PheWAS_df$`250.2`)
count(Incident_admission_PheWAS_imaging$`250.2`)
count(Prevalent_PheWAS_imaging$`250.2`)
#772 imaging-incident T2D diagnoses
#2,132 admission-incident T2D diagnoses 
#2,575 prevalent cases of T2D

```


4.2 T2D diagnosed by physician + non-cancer illness disease codes (T2D = 1223)
```{r}
#Load non-cancer illness data frame
non_cancer_file_path <- "file_path"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_non_cancer <- c("eid", "87-0.0", "87-1.0", "87-2.0", "87-3.0", "2976-0.0", "2976-1.0", "2976-2.0", "2976-3.0", "20002-0.0", "20002-1.0", "20002-2.0", "20002-3.0", "2443-0.0", "2443-1.0", "2443-2.0", "2443-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Non_cancer_illness_df <- fread(non_cancer_file_path, select = selected_columns_non_cancer)

colnames(Non_cancer_illness_df) = c("eid", "Age_non_cancer_illness_0", "Age_non_cancer_illness_1", "Age_non_cancer_illness_2", "Age_non_cancer_illness_3", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_0", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_1", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_2", "Age_diabetes_diagnosed_3", "Non_cancer_illness_0", "Non_cancer_illness_1", "Non_cancer_illness_2", "Non_cancer_illness_3", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_0", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_1", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_2", "Physician_diagnosed_diabetes_3")

non_cancer_file_path <- "file_path"

# Define the selected columns
selected_columns_non_cancer <- c("eid", "20009-0.0", "20009-1.0", "20009-2.0", "20009-3.0")

# Read the CSV file using fread
Non_cancer_illness_age_df <- fread(non_cancer_file_path, select = selected_columns_non_cancer)

colnames(Non_cancer_illness_age_df) = c("eid", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2", "Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3")

Non_cancer_illness_df = merge(Non_cancer_illness_df, Non_cancer_illness_age_df, by='eid')

export(Non_cancer_illness_df, "Non_cancer_illness_diabetes_df.csv")

Non_cancer_illness_df = Non_cancer_illness_diabetes_df

#Prevalence of T2D - 1,457
Non_cancer_illness_df = Non_cancer_illness_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223, TRUE, NA))
count(Non_cancer_illness_df$Prevalent_T2D)

Non_cancer_illness_df = subset(Non_cancer_illness_df, Non_cancer_illness_df$Prevalent_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence = Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1,18:22)]

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence <- Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence %>%
  mutate(new_column = coalesce(Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2, Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3))

Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence = subset(Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence, Non_cancer_T2D_prevalence$new_column>0)


#Incidence - imaging: 2 incident cases
Imaging_date_age_df = merge(Imaging_date, Age_sex_imaging_df, by='eid')
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = merge(Imaging_date_age_df, Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1:5,10:13,19:22)], by='eid')

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_0 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_1 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_2 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging
Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_3 = Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3 - Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_first_second_imaging

filtered_df <- Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes %>%
  filter(!(coalesce(Age_diff_0 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_1 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_2 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_3 < 0.5, FALSE)))

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = subset(filtered_df, filtered_df$Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223)

Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_T2D = 'TRUE'


#Incidence - admission: 76 incident cases
Assessment_date_age_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,1:2], ALMi_total_df[,1:2] , by='eid')
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = merge(Assessment_date_age_df, Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1:5,10:13,19:22)], by='eid')

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_0 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_0 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_1 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_1 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_2 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_2 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline
Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_diff_3 = Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Interpolated_age_non_cancer_illness_3 - Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Age_baseline

filtered_df <- Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes %>%
  filter(!(coalesce(Age_diff_0 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_1 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_2 < 0.5, FALSE) | 
           coalesce(Age_diff_3 < 0.5, FALSE)))

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes = subset(filtered_df, filtered_df$Non_cancer_illness_0 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_1 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_2 == 1223 | Non_cancer_illness_3 == 1223)

Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_admission_T2D = 'TRUE'

#Create data frame with prevalent, incident-imaging and incident-admission columns
data_frames <- list(Non_cancer_illness_df[,c(1,18)], Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes[,c(1,21)], Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes[,c(1,21)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Incident_T2D)
count(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D)

export(Non_cancer_illnes_T2D_df , "Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df.csv")

```


4.3 Primary care data

4.3.1 Mapping v2 and ctv3 codes to ICD9 and ICD10 codes (excluding the CM-ICD codes as reccommended)
```{r}
#Use the PheCode map from here: "C:\Users\Samuel Sjostrom\Downloads\Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm.csv\Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm.csv"
T2D_PheCode_map = subset(Phecode_map_v1_2_icd9_icd10cm, Phecode=='250.2') 

T2D_PheCode_ICD9_map = subset(T2D_PheCode_map, Flag=='9') 
ICD9_list <- T2D_PheCode_ICD9_map$ICD
quoted_ICD9 <- paste0('"', ICD9_list, '"')
comma_separated_ICD9 <- paste(quoted_ICD9, collapse = ", ")
cat(comma_separated_ICD9)
#34 ICD codes: 10 icd9 and 24 icd10
#ICD9: "250.00", "250.02", "250.20", "250.22", "250.30", "250.32", "250.80", "250.82", "250.90", "250.92" - the format with '.' are not found, hence remove them:
# "2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"

T2D_PheCode_ICD10_map = subset(T2D_PheCode_map, Flag=='10') 
ICD10_list <- T2D_PheCode_ICD10_map$ICD
quoted_ICD10 <- paste0('"', ICD10_list, '"')
comma_separated_ICD10 <- paste(quoted_ICD10, collapse = ", ")
cat(comma_separated_ICD10)
#ICD10: "E11.6", "E11.64", "E11.649", "E11.641", "E11.630", "E11.69", "E11.620", "E11.610", "E11.65", "O24.11", "E11.61", "E11.628", "E11.0", "E11", "E11.621", "E11.8", "E11.63", "E11.9", "E11.01", "E11.00", "E11.62", "E11.622", "E11.638", "E11.618" also remove the '.'

#Use the 'read_v2_icd10', 'read_v2_icd9', 'read_ctv3_icd10' and 'read_ctv3_icd9' data frames from "C:\Users\Samuel Sjostrom\Downloads\primarycare_codings\all_lkps_maps_v4.xlsx"

#Read_v2 codes for icd 9 and 10 separately and then rbind them

#Subset by the ICD10 codes belonging to PheCode 250.2
T2D_read_v2_ICD10 = subset(read_v2_ICD10, icd10_code %in% c("E116", "E1164", "E11649", "E11641", "E11630", "E1169", "E11620", "E11610", "E1165", "O2411", "E1161", "E11628", "E110", "E11", "E11621", "E118", "E1163", "E119", "E1101", "E1100", "E1162", "E11622", "E11638", "E11618"))

T2D_read_v2_ICD10$read_code_version = "v2"

T2D_read_v2_ICD10 = T2D_read_v2_ICD10[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD10$read_code), ]

T2D_read_v2_ICD9 = subset(read_v2_icd9, icd9_code %in% c("2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"))

T2D_read_v2_ICD9$read_code_version = "v2"

T2D_read_v2_ICD9 = T2D_read_v2_ICD9[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD9$read_code), ]

#rbind icd10 and 9 v2 data frames and remove duplicated read v2 codes
colnames(T2D_read_v2_ICD9)[c(2,3)] = c('ICD_code', 'ICD_code_def')
colnames(T2D_read_v2_ICD10)[c(2,3)] = c('ICD_code', 'ICD_code_def')
T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes = rbind(T2D_read_v2_ICD9, T2D_read_v2_ICD10)
T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes = T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes[!duplicated(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes$read_code), ]

export(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes, "T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes.csv")

#Read_ctv3 codes for icd 9 and 10 separately and then rbind them

#Subset by the ICD10 codes belonging to PheCode 250.2
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10 = subset(read_ctv3_ICD10, icd10_code %in% c("E116", "E1164", "E11649", "E11641", "E11630", "E1169", "E11620", "E11610", "E1165", "O2411", "E1161", "E11628", "E110", "E11", "E11621", "E118", "E1163", "E119", "E1101", "E1100", "E1162", "E11622", "E11638", "E11618"))

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10$read_code_version = "ctv3"

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10 = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10$read_code), ]

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9 = subset(read_ctv3_icd9, icd9_code %in% c("2500", "2502", "2503", "2508", "2509"))

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9$read_code_version = "ctv3"

T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9 = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9$read_code), ]

#rbind icd10 and 9 v2 data frames and remove duplicated read v2 codes
colnames(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9)[2] = 'ICD_code'
colnames(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10)[2] = 'ICD_code'
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes = rbind(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD9, T2D_read_ctv3_ICD10)
T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes = T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes[!duplicated(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes$read_code), ]

export(T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes, "T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes.csv")

#Create one df with read v2 and ctv3
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df = rbind(T2D_read_v2_ICD_codes[,c(1,2,4)], T2D_read_ctv3_ICD_codes[,c(1,2,8)])
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df = Read_code_v2_ctv3_df[!duplicated(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df$read_code), ]
Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated = Read_code_v2_ctv3_df
export(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated, "Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated.csv")
count(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$ICD_code) #7 unique ICD codes (4 ICD9 and 3 ICD10 codes)
count(Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code) #104 unique read codes
```

4.3.2 Extract the read v2 and read ctv 3 codes from the 'gp_clinical' to get participant eids and the event dates
```{r}
#Extract the read codes from the gp_clinical data frame
T2D_gp_clinical_v2 = subset(gp_clinical_df, 
                          read_2 %in% Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code)

T2D_gp_clinical_ctv3 = subset(gp_clinical_df, 
                          read_3 %in% Read_code_v2_ctv3_df_updated$read_code)

T2D_gp_clinical_updated = rbind(T2D_gp_clinical_v2, T2D_gp_clinical_ctv3)
T2D_gp_clinical_updated$event_date <- as.Date(T2D_gp_clinical_updated$event_dt, format="%d/%m/%Y")

#Remove duplicated eid entries (saves the first one) - check so it retains the FIRST date of diagnosis, yes it does
T2D_gp_clinical_updated = T2D_gp_clinical_updated[!duplicated(T2D_gp_clinical_updated$eid),]
T2D_gp_clinical_test = subset(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, T2D_gp_clinical_updated$eid=="4522908")

colnames(T2D_gp_clinical_updated)[1] = 'bridge_eid'
export(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, "T2D_gp_clinical_updated.csv")

#Merge with bridging file - the merge leads to the exclusion of 1463 imaging-participants, I think the bridging file needs to be updated to include more recent imaging participants
colnames(bridging_ukb48697_ukb66354.1) = c("xue_eid", "eid")
bridging_imaging = merge(bridging_ukb48697_ukb66354.1, Imaging_date, by='eid')

#This represents all prevalent T2D cases diagnosed in primary care in our imaging cohort - 1,010 prevalent cases (create a column for these)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_updated, bridging_imaging, by='bridge_eid')
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Prevalent_T2D = "TRUE"
colnames(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging)[17] = 'Prevalent_T2D_primary_care'

#Filter to only incident cases - only 4 cases of incident T2D
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff = T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$event_date-T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Imaging_date
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff = as.numeric(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging <- T2D_gp_clinical_imaging %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(time_diff > 182, TRUE, NA))
count(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D)

Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = subset(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, time_diff>182)

#Check so that these cases are not also captured by the PheCodes - 3 additional incident T2D cases not captured by PheCodes, but loads of 'incident' PheCodes that are not truly incident (see code chunk below where all are combined)
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, Incident_PheWAS_df[,c('eid', '250.2')], by='eid')
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, Incident_PheWAS_df[,c('eid', '250.2')], by='eid')
Incicent_T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D = "TRUE"

#Filter to UKBB admission incident cases -  453 cases of admission incident T2D
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission = T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$event_date-T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$`2006_2010` 
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission = as.numeric(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$time_diff_admission)
T2D_gp_clinical_imaging <- T2D_gp_clinical_imaging %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D_admission = ifelse(time_diff_admission > 182, TRUE, NA))
count(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging$Incident_T2D_admission)
```


4.4 Combine all of the above T2D into separate columns
- The incident-imaging case number went down when combining with the primary health care data, since many of these diagnoses of T2D occurred before the incident PheCodes were diagnosed: 772 (PheCode only) to 639 (with all ascertained outcomes combined). Hence, in order to capture the TRULY incident cases of T2D, the PheCode system should be complemented with the primary health care data, as T2D disease prevalence is already present when the incident PheCodes are diagnosed.
```{r}
#Prevalent --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

T2D_gp_clinical_updated$Prevalent_T2D = "TRUE"

data_frames <- list(PheWAS_imaging_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,17)])
data_frames <- list(PheWAS_final_table[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(10,11)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Prevalent_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Prevalent_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_prevalent_T2D", "Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D", "Primary_care_prevalent_T2D")
count(Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D) #48,053 across the whole cohort using advanced ascertainment method
count(Prevalent_T2D_df$PheCode_prevalent_T2D) #44,628 across the whole cohort using PheCodes only

Prevalent_T2D_df = Prevalent_T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, FALSE))
Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D[is.na(Prevalent_T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)] <- 'FALSE'

Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Prevalent_T2D_df, by='eid')

Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df = Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Prevalent_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_prevalent_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Prevalent_T2D) #3010
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_prevalent_T2D) #2575
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_prevalent_T2D) #531
count(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_prevalent_T2D) #1010

#Export one data frame merged with imaging dates and one not for PRS regressions
export(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df, 'Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df.csv')
export(Prevalent_T2D_df, 'Prevalent_T2D_df.csv')

#Incident - imaging -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data_frames <- list(Incident_PheWAS_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,3)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,13)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Incident_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Incident_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_incident_T2D", "Non_cancer_incident_T2D", "Primary_care_incident_T2D")

Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_T2D_df, by='eid')

Incident_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_incident_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_incident_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_incident_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D) #776
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_incident_T2D) #772
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_incident_T2D) #2
count(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_incident_T2D) #4

#Merge with dates from PheWAS and primary care diagnoses
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Add primary health care diagnosis dates
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,10)], Incident_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)

#Remove all prevalent cases by subsetting to only incident cases
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D == 'TRUE')

#Replace all of the dates with both Primary and PheCode available with Primary, as this contains the earlier T2D Diagnoses
Incident_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_dates = as.Date(ifelse(!is.na(event_date), event_date, `250.2_date`)))

Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_dates-Incident_T2D_imaging_df$Imaging_date
Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = as.numeric(Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff)

#Get the time-diff from the non_cancer data frame by using age as the time-scale variable
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence = subset(Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes, Imaging_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_incidence <- Non_cancer_T2D_incidence %>%
  mutate(Age_diff_first_incidence = pmin(Age_diff_0, Age_diff_1, Age_diff_2, Age_diff_3, na.rm = TRUE))
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = as.numeric(Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence)
Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = Non_cancer_T2D_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence*365

#Merge the data frames together
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Non_cancer_T2D_incidence[,c(1,22)], by='eid', all=T)

#Replace primary and PheCode NAs with the data from the non-cancer column
Incident_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_combined_time_diff = ifelse(!is.na(Age_diff_first_incidence),
                                     Age_diff_first_incidence,
                                     combined_time_diff))

#Subset data frame to remove any data entries less than 180 days - 639
Incident_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df$combined_combined_time_diff>180)
colnames(Incident_T2D_imaging_df)[12] = "T2D_time_to_event"
export(Incident_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Incident - assessment/recruitment --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data_frames <- list(Incident_PheWAS_admission_df[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,4)], T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,16)])
data_frames <- list(PheWAS_final_table[,c("eid", "250.2")], Non_cancer_illness_T2D_df[,c(1,2)], T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(10,11)])

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Incident_admission_T2D_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid', all = TRUE), data_frames)
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_df) = c("eid", "PheCode_incident_admission_T2D", "Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D", "Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D")

Incident_admission_T2D_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_df, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_df
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_admission_T2D_df, by='eid')

Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(PheCode_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE' | Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE' | Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE', TRUE, NA))

count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D) #2,323
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$PheCode_incident_admission_T2D) #2,132
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Non_cancer_incident_admission_T2D) #67
count(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Primary_care_incident_admission_T2D) #453

#Add admission date and the dates for the T2D events
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,1:2], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid')
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[2] = "Admission_date"

#Merge with dates from PheWAS and primary care diagnoses
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Add primary health care diagnosis dates
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_imaging[,c(1,10)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(T2D_gp_clinical_updated[,c(9,10)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, by='eid', all=T)

#Remove all prevalent cases by subsetting to only incident cases
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Incident_T2D == 'TRUE')

#Replace all of the dates with both Primary and PheCode available with Primary, as this contains the earlier T2D Diagnoses
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_dates = as.Date(ifelse(!is.na(event_date), event_date, `250.2_date`)))

colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[6] = "Admission_date"
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_dates-Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$Admission_date
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff = as.numeric(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_time_diff)
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,6,2,8:10)]
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[c(3,4)] = c('Primary_care_T2D_date', 'PheCode_T2D_date')
export(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Get the time-diff from the non_cancer data frame by using age as the time-scale variable
Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence = subset(Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes, Assessment_date_age_non_cancer_illnes$Incident_admission_T2D=='TRUE')

Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence <- Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence %>%
  mutate(Age_diff_first_incidence = pmin(Age_diff_0, Age_diff_1, Age_diff_2, Age_diff_3, na.rm = TRUE))

Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = as.numeric(Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence)
Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence = Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence$Age_diff_first_incidence*365

#Merge the data frames together
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = merge(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, Non_cancer_T2D_admission_incidence[,c(1,21)], by='eid', all=T)

#Replace primary and PheCode NAs with the data from the non-cancer column
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df <- Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df %>%
  mutate(combined_combined_time_diff = ifelse(!is.na(Age_diff_first_incidence),
                                     Age_diff_first_incidence,
                                     combined_time_diff))

#Subset data frame to remove any data entries less than 180 days - 2,071
Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df = subset(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df$combined_combined_time_diff>180)
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[13] = "T2D_time_to_event"
export(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df, 'Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df.csv')

#Create one data frame with all of the above outcomes
colnames(Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df)[8] = 'Incident_admission_T2D'
T2D_df = merge(Prevalent_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,2,6)], Incident_admission_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,3,8,10)], all=T)
T2D_df = merge(T2D_df, Incident_T2D_imaging_df[,c(1,7,9)], by='eid', all=T)
colnames(T2D_df)[c(6,8)] = c('Date_admission_incident_T2D', 'Date_imaging_incident_T2D')
T2D_df = merge(T2D_df, PheCode_dates[,c('eid', '250.2_date')], by='eid')

#Re-code the 'FALSE' and 'TRUE' data entries based on co-occurance of prevalent, admission-incident and imaging-incident cases
T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df$Incident_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Incident_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df <- T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_T2D = ifelse(Prevalent_T2D == TRUE & Incident_T2D == FALSE, NA, Incident_T2D))
T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D[is.na(T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D)] <- FALSE
T2D_df <- T2D_df %>%
  mutate(Incident_admission_T2D = ifelse(Prevalent_T2D == TRUE & Incident_admission_T2D == FALSE, NA, Incident_admission_T2D))

count(T2D_df$Prevalent_T2D) #2989
count(T2D_df$Incident_admission_T2D) #2060
count(T2D_df$Incident_T2D) #639

export(T2D_df, 'T2D_df.csv') #Final data frame with complete T2D case ascertainment 

```

5. Cohort characteristics 
--> 5.1 Multi-site cohort
--> 5.2 Regional BMFF cohorts
```{r}
#5.1 Multi-site cohort

#PC2 and all other traits for participants with complete BMFF measurements + T2D information/health records 
data_frames <- list(
  BMFF_PCA_df[,c(1,2,4,6,8,11,14:18,24)],
  Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4:24)],
  Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,14)],
  Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,14)],
  Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,14)],
  Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,14)]
)

# Use Reduce to merge them one by one
Cohort_characteristics_df = Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = 'eid'), data_frames)
Cohort_characteristics_df = merge(Cohort_characteristics_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

count(Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex)

# List of columns to analyze
columns <- c("Spine_BMFF", "Femoral_head_BMFF", "Total_hip_BMFF", "Diaphysis_BMFF",
             "PC2.x", "Age_first_second_imaging", "BMI_first_second_imaging",
             "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging",
             "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
             "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging",
             "Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging",
             "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Prevalent_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D", "Incident_T2D")


# Helper: determine if a column should be treated as binary (chi-squared)
is_binary_col <- function(col_name) {
  binary_names <- c("Prevalent_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D", "Incident_T2D")
  return(col_name %in% binary_names)
}

# Initialize an empty data frame for results
results_df <- data.frame(
  Column = character(),
  Both_Sexes = character(),
  Males = character(),
  Females = character(),
  P_Value = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (column in columns) {
  # Skip if column not present
  if (!column %in% names(Cohort_characteristics_df)) {
    warning("Column not found: ", column)
    next
  }

  # Subset to non-NA values for the current column and Sex
  data_filtered <- Cohort_characteristics_df[
    !is.na(Cohort_characteristics_df[[column]]) & !is.na(Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex),
  ]

  if (nrow(data_filtered) == 0) {
    warning("No non-NA data for column: ", column)
    next
  }

  # Ensure Sex is a factor with levels M and F
  data_filtered$Sex <- as.factor(data_filtered$Sex)
  data_filtered$Sex <- factor(data_filtered$Sex, levels = c("M", "F"))

  data_vector <- as.vector(data_filtered[[column]])
  sex_vector <- as.vector(data_filtered$Sex)

  if (is_binary_col(column)) {
    # Convert to a proper factor for contingency table
    # Coerce column to factor with its observed levels (e.g., TRUE/FALSE or 0/1 or "0"/"1")
    col_factor <- as.factor(data_vector)

    # Build contingency table: Sex x Column
    tbl <- table(sex_vector, col_factor)

    # If table is too sparse, skip
    if (nrow(tbl) < 2 || ncol(tbl) < 2) {
      p_value <- NA
      both_sexes_stats <- NA_character_
      males_stats <- NA_character_
      females_stats <- NA_character_
    } else {
      chi <- chisq.test(tbl)
      p_value <- chi$p.value
      # For reporting, you could add proportions by sex if desired; here keep P_Value
      both_sexes_stats <- NA_character_
      males_stats <- NA_character_
      females_stats <- NA_character_
    }
  } else {
    # Numeric: median/IQR by Sex and ANOVA
    data_vector_num <- as.numeric(data_vector)

    # Median and IQR for both sexes combined
    valid_idx <- !is.na(data_vector_num)
    data_vector_valid <- data_vector_num[valid_idx]
    median_both <- median(data_vector_valid, na.rm = TRUE)
    iqr_both <- IQR(data_vector_valid, na.rm = TRUE)
    both_sexes_stats <- sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", median_both, iqr_both)

    # Median and IQR by sex
    medians <- tapply(data_vector_num, sex_vector, median, na.rm = TRUE)
    iqrs <- tapply(data_vector_num, sex_vector, IQR, na.rm = TRUE)

    male_median <- if ("M" %in% names(medians)) medians[["M"]] else NA
    female_median <- if ("F" %in% names(medians)) medians[["F"]] else NA
    male_iqr <- if ("M" %in% names(iqrs)) iqrs[["M"]] else NA
    female_iqr <- if ("F" %in% names(iqrs)) iqrs[["F"]] else NA

    males_stats <- if (!is.na(male_median) && !is.na(male_iqr)) {
      sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", male_median, male_iqr)
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }

    females_stats <- if (!is.na(female_median) && !is.na(female_iqr)) {
      sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", female_median, female_iqr)
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }

    # ANOVA
    aov_fit <- aov(RankNorm(data_vector_num) ~ sex_vector)
    aov_sum <- summary(aov_fit)
    }

  results_df <- rbind(results_df, data.frame(
    Column = column,
    Both_Sexes = both_sexes_stats,
    Males = males_stats,
    Females = females_stats,
    P_Value = if (exists("p_value")) p_value else NA_real_,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

#Count number of males and females with each T2D outcome
count(Cohort_characteristics_df$Incident_T2D)

Cohort_characteristics_df %>%
  filter(Sex == "F" & !is.na(Incident_T2D)) %>%
  summarize(n_males_T2D = sum(Prevalent_T2D, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(n_males_T2D)

#5.2 Regional BMFF cohorts
Cohort_characteristics_df  = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df[,c(1,3,5,7)], by='eid') #Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df or Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df

count(Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex)

# List of columns to analyze
columns <- c("Mean.fat", "Age_first_second_imaging", "BMI_first_second_imaging",
             "WHR_first_second_imaging", "VATi_first_second_imaging",
             "ASATi_first_second_imaging", "TTMFI_first_second_imaging",
             "TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging", "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging", "Prevalent_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D", "Incident_T2D")


# Helper: determine if a column should be treated as binary (chi-squared)
is_binary_col <- function(col_name) {
  binary_names <- c("Prevalent_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D", "Incident_T2D")
  return(col_name %in% binary_names)
}

# Initialize an empty data frame for results
results_df <- data.frame(
  Column = character(),
  Both_Sexes = character(),
  Males = character(),
  Females = character(),
  P_Value = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (column in columns) {
  # Skip if column not present
  if (!column %in% names(Cohort_characteristics_df)) {
    warning("Column not found: ", column)
    next
  }

  # Subset to non-NA values for the current column and Sex
  data_filtered <- Cohort_characteristics_df[
    !is.na(Cohort_characteristics_df[[column]]) & !is.na(Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex),
  ]

  if (nrow(data_filtered) == 0) {
    warning("No non-NA data for column: ", column)
    next
  }

  # Ensure Sex is a factor with levels M and F
  data_filtered$Sex <- as.factor(data_filtered$Sex)
  data_filtered$Sex <- factor(data_filtered$Sex, levels = c("M", "F"))

  data_vector <- as.vector(data_filtered[[column]])
  sex_vector <- as.vector(data_filtered$Sex)

  if (is_binary_col(column)) {
    # Convert to a proper factor for contingency table
    # Coerce column to factor with its observed levels (e.g., TRUE/FALSE or 0/1 or "0"/"1")
    col_factor <- as.factor(data_vector)

    # Build contingency table: Sex x Column
    tbl <- table(sex_vector, col_factor)

    # If table is too sparse, skip
    if (nrow(tbl) < 2 || ncol(tbl) < 2) {
      p_value <- NA
      both_sexes_stats <- NA_character_
      males_stats <- NA_character_
      females_stats <- NA_character_
    } else {
      chi <- chisq.test(tbl)
      p_value <- chi$p.value
      # For reporting, you could add proportions by sex if desired; here keep P_Value
      both_sexes_stats <- NA_character_
      males_stats <- NA_character_
      females_stats <- NA_character_
    }
  } else {
    # Numeric: median/IQR by Sex and ANOVA
    data_vector_num <- as.numeric(data_vector)

    # Median and IQR for both sexes combined
    valid_idx <- !is.na(data_vector_num)
    data_vector_valid <- data_vector_num[valid_idx]
    median_both <- median(data_vector_valid, na.rm = TRUE)
    iqr_both <- IQR(data_vector_valid, na.rm = TRUE)
    both_sexes_stats <- sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", median_both, iqr_both)

    # Median and IQR by sex
    medians <- tapply(data_vector_num, sex_vector, median, na.rm = TRUE)
    iqrs <- tapply(data_vector_num, sex_vector, IQR, na.rm = TRUE)

    male_median <- if ("M" %in% names(medians)) medians[["M"]] else NA
    female_median <- if ("F" %in% names(medians)) medians[["F"]] else NA
    male_iqr <- if ("M" %in% names(iqrs)) iqrs[["M"]] else NA
    female_iqr <- if ("F" %in% names(iqrs)) iqrs[["F"]] else NA

    males_stats <- if (!is.na(male_median) && !is.na(male_iqr)) {
      sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", male_median, male_iqr)
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }

    females_stats <- if (!is.na(female_median) && !is.na(female_iqr)) {
      sprintf("%.2f ± %.2f", female_median, female_iqr)
    } else {
      NA_character_
    }

    # ANOVA
    aov_fit <- aov(RankNorm(data_vector_num) ~ sex_vector)
    aov_sum <- summary(aov_fit)
    }

  results_df <- rbind(results_df, data.frame(
    Column = column,
    Both_Sexes = both_sexes_stats,
    Males = males_stats,
    Females = females_stats,
    P_Value = if (exists("p_value")) p_value else NA_real_,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

export(results_df, 'results_df.xlsx')

#Count number of males and females with each T2D outcome
count(Cohort_characteristics_df$Prevalent_T2D)

Cohort_characteristics_df %>%
  filter(Sex == "M" & !is.na(Prevalent_T2D)) %>%
  summarize(n_males_T2D = sum(Prevalent_T2D, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(n_males_T2D)
  
median(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$Multi_site_1)
IQR(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates$Multi_site_1)

BMFF_PCA_df_covariates %>%
  filter(Sex=="F") %>%
  summarise(
    median_value = median(Multi_site_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_value = IQR(Multi_site_1, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# For-loop:
outcomes <- c("Prevalent_T2D", "Incident_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D")

# Initialize results data frame
results <- data.frame(
  outcome     = outcomes,
  cases_all   = NA_integer_,
  cases_male  = NA_integer_,
  cases_female= NA_integer_,
  n_all       = NA_integer_,
  n_male      = NA_integer_,
  n_female    = NA_integer_,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Precompute sex indices
idxM <- Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex == "M"
idxF <- Cohort_characteristics_df$Sex == "F"

for (i in seq_along(outcomes)) {
  var <- outcomes[i]
  v <- Cohort_characteristics_df[[var]]

  # Denominators (non-missing outcome within each stratum)
  n_all    <- sum(!is.na(v))
  n_male   <- sum(idxM & !is.na(v), na.rm = TRUE)
  n_female <- sum(idxF & !is.na(v), na.rm = TRUE)

  # Case counts (value == 1)
  cases_all    <- sum(v == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  cases_male   <- sum(v[idxM] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  cases_female <- sum(v[idxF] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

  results$cases_all[i]     <- cases_all
  results$cases_male[i]    <- cases_male
  results$cases_female[i]  <- cases_female
  results$n_all[i]         <- n_all
  results$n_male[i]        <- n_male
  results$n_female[i]      <- n_female
}

results

export(results, 'results.xlsx')

```


6. Carry out prevalent T2D logistic regressions for regional BMFF and each multi-site measurement
```{r}
#Create body composition principal components (BC_PCs) without Liver PDFF and merge with each data frame
BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(6:10)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)
Imp_PC2_regressions_df = cbind(Imp_PC2_regressions_df, BMFF_PCA_analysis_df)
PC2_df_covariates = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(6:10)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)

Spine_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(6:10)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)

Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(6:10)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)

Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)

Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

#Create body composition principal components (BC_PCs) with Liver PDFF ('model 4' sensitivity analyses)
Imp_PC2_regressions_df = Imp_PC2_regressions_df[!is.na(Imp_PC2_regressions_df$Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging),]

BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = merge(Imp_BMFF_PCA_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df$Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging),]
BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(6:10,12)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)
Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df = cbind(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(20:24)], BMFF_PCA_analysis_df)
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df$Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging),]
BC_PCA = prcomp(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(6:10,12)], scale = TRUE)
BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)
Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df = cbind(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(20:24)], BMFF_PCA_analysis_df)
Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Femoral_head_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df$Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging),]

BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)

Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Total_hip_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[!is.na(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df$Liver_PDFF_first_second_imaging),]

BMFF_PCA_analysis_df = data.frame(BC_PCA$x)
Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df = cbind(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df[,-c(20:24)], BMFF_PCA_analysis_df)
Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Imp_Diaphysis_BMFF_regressions_df, T2D_df, by='eid')

#Run with complete-case BMD covariates for sensitivity analysis
Spine_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates[,-c(14)], Spine_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid')
Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates[,-c(14)], Femur_neck_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid')
Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates[,-c(14)], Femur_troch_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid')
Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates = merge(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates[,-c(14)], Femur_shaft_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid')
BMFF_PCA_df_covariates = merge(BMFF_PCA_df_covariates[,-c(42)], Total_BMD_imaging_df[,c(1,4)], by='eid')

#Count the number of T2D cases and controls for all measurements in both sexes and in males and females separately - use forloop below

library(dplyr)

# List of data frames to process
dfs <- list(
  Spine = Spine_BMFF_df_covariates,
  FemoralHead = Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates,
  TotalHip = Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates,
  Diaphysis = Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates,
  BMFF_PCA = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates
)

# Helper to produce the six counts for a given data frame
row_for_df <- function(df, name) {
  Case   <- df %>% filter(Prevalent_T2D == "TRUE")  %>% tally() %>% pull(n)
  Control<- df %>% filter(Prevalent_T2D == "FALSE") %>% tally() %>% pull(n)
  Case_M <- df %>% filter(Sex == "M" & Prevalent_T2D == "TRUE")  %>% tally() %>% pull(n)
  Control_M <- df %>% filter(Sex == "M" & Prevalent_T2D == "FALSE") %>% tally() %>% pull(n)
  Case_F <- df %>% filter(Sex == "F" & Prevalent_T2D == "TRUE")  %>% tally() %>% pull(n)
  Control_F <- df %>% filter(Sex == "F" & Prevalent_T2D == "FALSE") %>% tally() %>% pull(n)

  data.frame(
    DataFrame = name,
    Case = Case,
    Control = Control,
    Case_M = Case_M,
    Control_M = Control_M,
    Case_F = Case_F,
    Control_F = Control_F,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Build results for all data frames
results_list <- lapply(names(dfs), function(nm) row_for_df(dfs[[nm]], nm))

# Combine into one data frame
results_df <- bind_rows(results_list)
results_df$Both_case_control = paste(results_df$Case, results_df$Control, sep='/')
results_df$M_case_control = paste(results_df$Case_M, results_df$Control_M, sep='/')
results_df$F_case_control = paste(results_df$Case_F, results_df$Control_F, sep='/')
results_count_df = results_df
export(results_count_df, 'results_count_df.csv')

#Carry out logistic regressions, diagnostics and calculate VIFs for each regression and store in data frames

#Diagnostics

plot(Multi_site_T2D_glm, 4) #Cook's distance

#Standardized residuals vs observations
model.data <- augment(Multi_site_T2D_glm) %>% 
  mutate(index = 1:n()) #calculates various model parameters from broom package 

ggplot(model.data, aes(index, .std.resid)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color = Prevalent_T2D), alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw()

model.data %>% 
  filter(abs(.std.resid) > 3) #50 values with std residuals above 3 --> look at studendized residuals

#Studendized residuals - more reliable metric as it comes with multiple comparison adjusted p-values testing if the largest residual point is truly influential

outlierTest(Multi_site_T2D_glm) # Largest studendized residual value: 3.381918, un-adjusted p = 0.00071982, No Studentized residuals with Bonferroni p < 0.05 --> likely that these are not truly influential observations

influencePlot(Multi_site_T2D_glm, id.method = "identify")

#Extract the predicted probabilities
probabilities <- predict(Multi_site_T2D_glm, type = "response")
head(probabilities)

mydata <- BMFF_PCA_df_covariates[,c('rt_PC2', 'Age_first_second_imaging','Total_BMD_first_second_imaging','PC1','PC2','PC3','PC4','PC5','PC6','TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging')] 
predictors <- colnames(mydata)

# Bind the logit and tidying the data for plot - generates an 'rbound' data frame with the logit of the model vs corresponding expsoure/predictor values for each continuous exposure variable (40,363 rows for each predcitor)
mydata <- mydata %>%
  mutate(logit = log(probabilities/(1-probabilities))) %>%
  gather(key = "predictors", value = "predictor.value", -logit)

ggplot(mydata, aes(logit, predictor.value))+
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se=FALSE) + 
  theme_bw() + 
  facet_wrap(~predictors, scales = "free_y")

#Set up a for-loop to get the summary stats and the VIFs:

#Re-name exposure columns for regional BMFF 
colnames(Spine_BMFF_df_covariates)[3] = 'rt_Spine_BMFF'
colnames(Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates)[3] = 'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF'
colnames(Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates)[3] = 'rt_Total_hip_BMFF'
colnames(Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates)[3] = 'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF'

## -----------------------------
## Helper: compute ORs, CIs, P-values
## -----------------------------
get_OR_ci_p <- function(model) {
  smry <- summary(model)
  coef_vals <- coef(model)
  pvals <- coef(smry)[, "Pr(>|z|)"]
  ci <- suppressMessages(confint(model))  # quieter
  or <- exp(cbind(OR = coef_vals, ci))

  non_intercept_idx <- 2:length(coef_vals)  # skip intercept

  data.frame(
    Term   = names(coef_vals)[non_intercept_idx],
    OR     = or[non_intercept_idx, "OR"],
    Lower  = exp(ci[non_intercept_idx, 1]),
    Upper  = exp(ci[non_intercept_idx, 2]),
    P_Value = pvals[non_intercept_idx],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

## -----------------------------
## Helper: run glm safely
## -----------------------------
run_model <- function(data, formula_str) {
  form <- as.formula(formula_str)
  vars_in_formula <- all.vars(form)

  # Check that required variables are in the data
  missing <- setdiff(vars_in_formula, names(data))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    warning("Missing variables in data for formula: ",
            paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
    return(data.frame(
      Term = NA_character_, OR = NA_real_,
      Lower = NA_real_, Upper = NA_real_,
      P_Value = NA_real_, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  sub_data <- data[complete.cases(data[, vars_in_formula, drop = FALSE]), ]
  if (nrow(sub_data) < 2) {
    return(data.frame(
      Term = NA_character_, OR = NA_real_,
      Lower = NA_real_, Upper = NA_real_,
      P_Value = NA_real_, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  mod <- glm(form, family = binomial, data = sub_data)
  get_OR_ci_p(mod)
}

## -----------------------------
## Base model templates
## -----------------------------
base_model1 <- "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging"
base_model2 <- "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ"
base_model3 <- "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5 +  PC6 + TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging"

expand_formula <- function(base, expo) {
  gsub("EXPO", expo, base, fixed = TRUE)
}

## -----------------------------
## Exposure definitions
## -----------------------------
exposures_def <- list(
  list(expo = "rt_PC1",                 df = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates,      bmd_cov = "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = "rt_PC2",                 df = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates,      bmd_cov = "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = "rt_Spine_Femoral_ratio", df = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates,    bmd_cov = "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = "rt_Multi_site_1",        df = BMFF_PCA_df_covariates,      bmd_cov = "Total_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = 'rt_Spine_BMFF',          df = Spine_BMFF_df_covariates,    bmd_cov = "Spine_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = 'rt_Femoral_head_BMFF',   df = Femoral_head_BMFF_df_covariates, bmd_cov = "Femur_neck_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = 'rt_Total_hip_BMFF',      df = Total_hip_BMFF_df_covariates,    bmd_cov = "Femur_troch_BMD_first_second_imaging"),
  list(expo = 'rt_Diaphysis_BMFF',      df = Diaphysis_BMFF_df_covariates,    bmd_cov = "Femur_shaft_BMD_first_second_imaging")
)

## -----------------------------
## Run models
## -----------------------------
results_list <- list()

for (def in exposures_def) {
  expo   <- def$expo
  df     <- def$df
  bmd_cov <- def$bmd_cov

  # Optional: check exposure exists in this data frame
  if (!(expo %in% names(df))) {
    warning("Exposure '", expo, "' not found in this data frame; skipping.")
    next
  }

  ## ---- Model 1: all sexes
  f1   <- expand_formula(base_model1, expo)
  res1 <- run_model(df, f1)
  results_list[[paste0("Model1_all_", expo)]] <- res1

  ## ---- Model 1: males only
  f1_m   <- expand_formula(
    "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging",
    expo
  )
  res1_m <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f1_m)
  results_list[[paste0("Model1_M_", expo)]] <- res1_m

  ## ---- Model 1: females only
  f1_f   <- expand_formula(
    "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging",
    expo
  )
  res1_f <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f1_f)
  results_list[[paste0("Model1_F_", expo)]] <- res1_f

  ## ---- Model 2: all, with per-exposure BMD covariate
  if (!is.null(bmd_cov) && nchar(bmd_cov) > 0) {
    # Correctly plug the exposure instead of literal "EXPO"
    f2 <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    res2 <- run_model(df, f2)
    results_list[[paste0("Model2_all_", expo)]] <- res2

    ## Model 2: males
    f2_m <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    res2_m <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f2_m)
    results_list[[paste0("Model2_M_", expo)]] <- res2_m

    ## Model 2: females
    f2_f <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    res2_f <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f2_f)
    results_list[[paste0("Model2_F_", expo)]] <- res2_f
  }

  ## ---- Model 3: all, with per-exposure BMD covariate + PCs
  ## Only run if PC1–PC5 are available in this data frame
  has_PCs <- all(c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3", "PC4", "PC5", "PC6") %in% names(df))

  if (!is.null(bmd_cov) && nchar(bmd_cov) > 0 && has_PCs) {
    base3_expo <- expand_formula(base_model3, expo)
    base3_expo <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, base3_expo, fixed = TRUE)
    res3 <- run_model(df, base3_expo)
    results_list[[paste0("Model3_all_", expo)]] <- res3

    ## Model 3: males
    f3_m <- expand_formula(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5 + PC6 + TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
      expo
    )
    f3_m <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, f3_m, fixed = TRUE)
    res3_m <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f3_m)
    results_list[[paste0("Model3_M_", expo)]] <- res3_m

    ## Model 3: females
    f3_f <- expand_formula(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5 + PC6 + TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
      expo
    )
    f3_f <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, f3_f, fixed = TRUE)
    res3_f <- run_model(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f3_f)
    results_list[[paste0("Model3_F_", expo)]] <- res3_f
  }
}

## -----------------------------
## Combine results
## -----------------------------
combine_results <- lapply(names(results_list), function(nm) {
  vec  <- results_list[[nm]]
  data <- as.data.frame(vec, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    data <- data.frame(
      Term = NA_character_, OR = NA_real_,
      Lower = NA_real_, Upper = NA_real_,
      P_Value = NA_real_, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  # Parse name: "Model1_all_rt_PC1" -> Model="Model1", Subset="all", Exposure="rt_PC1"
  parts <- strsplit(nm, "_")
  model  <- parts
  subset <- if (length(parts) >= 2) parts else "All"
  expo   <- if (length(parts) > 2) paste(parts[-(1:2)], collapse = "_") else NA_character_

  subset_label <- dplyr::case_when(
    subset == "M"   ~ "Male",
    subset == "F"   ~ "Female",
    TRUE            ~ "All"
  )

  data$Exposure <- expo
  data$Model    <- model
  data$Subset   <- subset_label

  data <- data[, c("Exposure", "Model", "Subset", "Term", "OR", "Lower", "Upper", "P_Value")]
  data
})

results_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(combine_results)

results_df <- results_df %>%
  mutate("OR (95%CI)" = factor(paste(round(`OR`, 3), 
                                              " (", 
                                              round(`Lower`, 3), 
                                              ", ", 
                                              round(`Upper`, 3), 
                                              ")", 
                                              sep = "")))

results_df <- results_df %>%
  filter(Term %in% c(
    "rt_PC1", "rt_PC2", "rt_Spine_Femoral_ratio", "rt_Multi_site_1",
    "rt_Spine_BMFF", "rt_Femoral_head_BMFF", "rt_Total_hip_BMFF", "rt_Diaphysis_BMFF"
  ))

export(results_df, 'results_df.csv')

# Extract VIFs for all models

# Packages
library(car)
library(dplyr)

# Helper: safely fit a glm for VIF extraction
fit_model_for_vif <- function(data, formula_str) {
  form <- as.formula(formula_str)
  vars_in_formula <- all.vars(form)

  # Check that required variables are in the data
  missing <- setdiff(vars_in_formula, names(data))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    warning("Skipping VIF; missing variables in data for formula: ",
            paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Complete cases on all variables in formula
  sub_data <- data[complete.cases(data[, vars_in_formula, drop = FALSE]), ]
  if (nrow(sub_data) < 2) {
    warning("Skipping VIF; not enough complete cases for formula: ", formula_str)
    return(NULL)
  }

  glm(form, family = binomial, data = sub_data)
}

# Helper: extract VIF (or GVIF^(1/(2*Df)) for factors) into a data.frame
get_vif_df <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)

  v <- car::vif(model)

  # car::vif returns:
  # - numeric vector for simple numeric predictors
  # - matrix with GVIF, Df, and GVIF^(1/(2*Df)) for factors
  if (is.matrix(v)) {
    out <- data.frame(
      Term = rownames(v),
      VIF  = v[, "GVIF^(1/(2*Df))"],  # comparable to standard VIF
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  } else {
    out <- data.frame(
      Term = names(v),
      VIF  = as.numeric(v),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  out
}

# ---------------------------------------
# Compute VIFs for all models and exposures
# ---------------------------------------
vif_results_list <- list()

for (def in exposures_def) {
  expo   <- def$expo
  df     <- def$df
  bmd_cov <- def$bmd_cov

  # Optional safety: skip if exposure not present in df
  if (!(expo %in% names(df))) {
    warning("Exposure '", expo, "' not found in this data frame; skipping VIF for this exposure.")
    next
  }

  ## ---- Model 1: all sexes
  f1  <- expand_formula(base_model1, expo)
  m1  <- fit_model_for_vif(df, f1)
  v1  <- get_vif_df(m1)
  if (!is.null(v1)) {
    vif_results_list[[paste0("Model1_all_", expo)]] <- v1
  }

  ## ---- Model 1: males only
  f1_m <- expand_formula(
    "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging",
    expo
  )
  m1_m <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f1_m)
  v1_m <- get_vif_df(m1_m)
  if (!is.null(v1_m)) {
    vif_results_list[[paste0("Model1_M_", expo)]] <- v1_m
  }

  ## ---- Model 1: females only
  f1_f <- expand_formula(
    "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging",
    expo
  )
  m1_f <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f1_f)
  v1_f <- get_vif_df(m1_f)
  if (!is.null(v1_f)) {
    vif_results_list[[paste0("Model1_F_", expo)]] <- v1_f
  }

  ## ---- Model 2: all sexes, with per-exposure BMD covariate
  if (!is.null(bmd_cov) && nchar(bmd_cov) > 0) {
    f2 <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Sex + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    m2 <- fit_model_for_vif(df, f2)
    v2 <- get_vif_df(m2)
    if (!is.null(v2)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model2_all_", expo)]] <- v2
    }

    ## Model 2: males
    f2_m <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    m2_m <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f2_m)
    v2_m <- get_vif_df(m2_m)
    if (!is.null(v2_m)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model2_M_", expo)]] <- v2_m
    }

    ## Model 2: females
    f2_f <- paste0(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ ", expo,
      " + Age_first_second_imaging + BMI_first_second_imaging + ",
      bmd_cov
    )
    m2_f <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f2_f)
    v2_f <- get_vif_df(m2_f)
    if (!is.null(v2_f)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model2_F_", expo)]] <- v2_f
    }
  }

  ## ---- Model 3: all sexes, with BMD covariate + PCs
  has_PCs <- all(c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3", "PC4", "PC5") %in% names(df))

  if (!is.null(bmd_cov) && nchar(bmd_cov) > 0 && has_PCs) {
    base3_expo <- expand_formula(base_model3, expo)
    base3_expo <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, base3_expo, fixed = TRUE)
    m3 <- fit_model_for_vif(df, base3_expo)
    v3 <- get_vif_df(m3)
    if (!is.null(v3)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model3_all_", expo)]] <- v3
    }

    ## Model 3: males
    f3_m <- expand_formula(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5 + TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
      expo
    )
    f3_m <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, f3_m, fixed = TRUE)
    m3_m <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "M"), f3_m)
    v3_m <- get_vif_df(m3_m)
    if (!is.null(v3_m)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model3_M_", expo)]] <- v3_m
    }

    ## Model 3: females
    f3_f <- expand_formula(
      "Prevalent_T2D ~ EXPO + Age_first_second_imaging + BMD_ADJ + PC1 + PC2 + PC3 + PC4 + PC5 + TTFFMVi_first_second_imaging",
      expo
    )
    f3_f <- gsub("BMD_ADJ", bmd_cov, f3_f, fixed = TRUE)
    m3_f <- fit_model_for_vif(subset(df, Sex == "F"), f3_f)
    v3_f <- get_vif_df(m3_f)
    if (!is.null(v3_f)) {
      vif_results_list[[paste0("Model3_F_", expo)]] <- v3_f
    }
  }
}

# ---------------------------------------
# Combine VIF results into a single data frame
# ---------------------------------------
combine_vif_results <- lapply(names(vif_results_list), function(nm) {
  df_v <- vif_results_list[[nm]]
  if (is.null(df_v) || nrow(df_v) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Parse name "Model1_all_rt_Spine_Femoral_ratio"
  parts <- strsplit(nm, "_")
  model  <- parts
  subset <- if (length(parts) >= 2) parts else "all"
  expo   <- if (length(parts) > 2) paste(parts[-(1:2)], collapse = "_") else NA_character_

  subset_label <- dplyr::case_when(
    subset == "M"   ~ "Male",
    subset == "F"   ~ "Female",
    TRUE            ~ "All"
  )

  df_v$Exposure <- expo
  df_v$Model    <- model
  df_v$Subset   <- subset_label

  df_v[, c("Exposure", "Model", "Subset", "Term", "VIF")]
})

vif_df_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(combine_vif_results)

#Post-procesing - tidying up final table
results_vif_df = cbind(results_df, vif_df_all[,5])
colnames(results_vif_df)[10] = 'VIF'

pattern <- c("Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1","Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1","Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1", "Model 1",
             "Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2","Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2","Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2","Model 2", "Model 2", "Model 2","Model 2", 
             "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3",
             "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3", "Model 3",
             "Model 3", "Model 3")

results_vif_df$Adjustment_model <- rep(pattern, length.out = nrow(results_vif_df))

pattern <- c("Both", "Both", "Both", "Both", 
             "M", "M", "M", 
             "F", "F", "F",
             "Both", "Both", "Both", "Both", "Both",
             "M", "M", "M", "M", 
             "F", "F", "F", "F",
             "Both", "Both", "Both", "Both", "Both","Both", "Both", "Both", "Both", "Both",
             "M", "M", "M", "M", "M", "M", "M", "M", "M",
             "F", "F", "F", "F","F", "F", "F", "F","F")

results_vif_df$Sex <- rep(pattern, length.out = nrow(results_vif_df))

colnames(results_vif_df)[4] = 'Primary_exposure'

results_vif_df = results_vif_df[,c(4,11,12,9,8,10)]

export(results_vif_df, 'Multi_site_T2D_GLM_results_VIF.csv')

#For model 3 only
results_vif_df = subset(results_vif_df, Adjustment_model=='Model 3')
results_vif_df$VIF = round(results_vif_df$VIF, 3)

export(results_vif_df, 'Multi_site_T2D_GLM_results_VIF_model_3.csv')

#For summary data frame - skip this for full data frame with VIFs
results_vif_df = subset(results_vif_df, grepl("^rt", Term))

export(results_vif_df, 'Multi_site_T2D_GLM_results_VIF.csv')

#Forest plot for in-text figure

Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), 
  Predictor = c("Spine BMFF","Spine BMFF","Spine BMFF", "Femoral head BMFF","Femoral head BMFF","Femoral head BMFF", "Total hip BMFF","Total hip BMFF","Total hip BMFF", "Diaphysis BMFF","Diaphysis BMFF","Diaphysis BMFF", "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio","Spine:femoral BMFF ratio","Spine:femoral BMFF ratio", "Multi_site 1","Multi_site 1","Multi_site 1", "PC1","PC1","PC1", "PC2","PC2","PC2"),
  Model = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3","Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3"),
  OR = c(1.567, 1.609, 1.438,  0.769, 0.778, 0.775,  0.735, 0.748, 0.764,  0.824, 0.863, 0.884,  1.763, 1.792, 1.590,  0.686, 0.681, 0.714,  1.194, 1.183, 1.184,  1.922, 1.929, 1.720),
  LL = c(1.498, 1.538, 1.372,  0.736, 0.743, 0.739,  0.701, 0.713, 0.728,  0.789, 0.824, 0.843,  1.676, 1.703, 1.508,  0.652, 0.646, 0.676,  1.137, 1.123, 1.122,  1.825, 1.833, 1.631),
  UL = c(1.638, 1.684, 1.507,  0.805, 0.815, 0.812,  0.770, 0.785, 0.803,  0.862, 0.904, 0.927,  1.855, 1.886, 1.676,  0.721, 0.718, 0.755,  1.255, 1.247, 1.249,  2.023, 2.032, 1.815),
  p = c(2.424966e-86, 8.044218e-95, 9.509144e-52, 3.554800e-30, 5.620645e-26, 7.513845e-26, 8.145209e-38, 2.940804e-32, 8.129195e-27, 1.536827e-17, 4.576119e-10, 3.850806e-07, 1.794642e-106, 1.733622e-111, 3.517606e-66, 51.895979e-48, 2.470417e-46, 2.174831e-33, 2.323071e-12, 3.313000e-10, 6.090894e-10, 1.928509e-136, 3.842780e-138, 4.406644e-88)
)

df <- Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df

# Ensure order of predictors and models
df$Predictor <- factor(
  df$Predictor,
  levels = c(
    "Spine BMFF",
    "Femoral head BMFF",
    "Total hip BMFF",
    "Diaphysis BMFF",
    "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio",
    "Multi_site 1",
    "PC1",
    "PC2"
  )
)

df$Model <- factor(df$Model, levels = c("Model 1", "Model 2", "Model 3"))

# Combined factor: Predictor + Model, Model 1 (top), then 2, then 3
df <- df %>%
  mutate(Predictor_Model = interaction(Predictor, Model, sep = " - ", lex.order = TRUE))

df$Predictor_Model <- factor(
  df$Predictor_Model,
  levels = rev(levels(df$Predictor_Model))
)

Multi_site_T2D_plot = ggplot(df, aes(x = OR, y = Predictor_Model, color = Predictor)) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 1,
    color = "darkred",
    linetype = "dashed",
    size = 0.5,
    alpha = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Model, size = -log10(p))) +
  xlab("Odds Ratio (95% CI)") +
  ylab("") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    # Remove y-axis text, ticks, and title
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Spine BMFF"               = "steelblue",
    "Femoral head BMFF"        = "#3b3b3b",
    "Total hip BMFF"           = "red",
    "Diaphysis BMFF"           = "purple",
    "Spine:femoral BMFF ratio" = "#9B870C",
    "Multi_site 1"             = "#ff62b2",
    "PC1"                      = "blue",
    "PC2"                      = "darkorange"
  )) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Model 1" = 15, "Model 2" = 16, "Model 3" = 17))+
  scale_size_continuous(
    name   = "-log10(p)",
    range  = c(2, 8),          
    breaks = c(10, 50, 100, 140)       
  )

Multi_site_T2D_plot

ggsave(filename = "Multi_site_T2D_plot.png", plot = Multi_site_T2D_plot, device = "png", width = 20, height = 10)

```


7. PheWAS

7.1 Spine BMFF
```{r}
#Predictor file - use the same file for all of them
Spine_rt_BMFF_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,3)])
Spine_rt_BMFF_df = Spine_rt_BMFF_df[,-2]
```


7.1.1 Incident
```{r}
#PheWAS file - phenotype files
Incident_spine_PheWAS_df = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,3)], Incident_PheWAS_df, by='eid')
Incident_spine_PheWAS_df = Incident_spine_PheWAS_df[,-2]

#Model 1
Spine_covariates_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4:6)], by='eid')
Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_Spine_PheWAS)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

export(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, 'Model_1_incident_spine_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2
Spine_covariates_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4:6,14)], by='eid')
Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_Spine_PheWAS)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_2"

export(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, 'Model_2_incident_spine_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 3
Spine_covariates_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4:5,11,14,20:24)], by='eid')
Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_Spine_PheWAS)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_3"

export(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, 'Model_3_incident_spine_PheWAS.csv')
```


7.1.2 Admission-incident
```{r}
Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df = merge(Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,3)], Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, by='eid')
Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df = merge(Imaging_date, Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df, by='eid')
Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df = Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df[,-c(2:3)]

#Model 1
Spine_covariates_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4:6)], by='eid')
Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_admission_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_Spine_PheWAS)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

export(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, 'Model_1_admission_incident_spine_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2

Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]
```
