```{r}
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_2"

Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]
```

7.1.4 Sex stratified
```{r}

Spine_M_rt_BMFF_df = subset(Spine_sex_rt_BMFF_df, Sex=='M')
Spine_F_rt_BMFF_df = subset(Spine_sex_rt_BMFF_df, Sex=='F')
```

```{r}

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_admission_F_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_F_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=200))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_Spine_PheWAS)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=200)
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = Incident_Spine_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_Spine_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

export(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, 'Model_1_admission_incident_female_spine_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2 - M
Spine_covariates_df = merge(Incident_M_spine_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_Spine_BMFF_regressions_df[,c(1,4,6,14)], by='eid')
Spine_covariates_df = Spine_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_Spine_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_admission_M_spine_PheWAS_df, predictors = Spine_M_rt_BMFF_df, covariates = Spine_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=200))

Incident_Spine_PheWAS = subset(Incident_Spine_PheWAS, Incident_Spine_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_Spine_PheWAS$n_cases>=200)

  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())
```

7.2 PC2
```{r}
#Predictor file - use the same file for all of them
PC2_rt_df = merge(Incident_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,3)])
PC2_rt_df = PC2_rt_df[,-2]
```


7.2.1 Incident
```{r}
#PheWAS file - phenotype files
Incident_PC2_PheWAS_df = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,3)], Incident_PheWAS_df, by='eid')
Incident_PC2_PheWAS_df = Incident_PC2_PheWAS_df[,-2]

PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS

Incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Incident_PC2_PheWAS, Incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Incident_PC2_PheWAS = Incident_PC2_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE

  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_PC2_PheWAS = Incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

#Model 2

PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

Incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Incident_PC2_PheWAS, Incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)

  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Incident_PC2_PheWAS = Incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_2"

#Model 3

PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS
```

7.2.2 Admission incident
```{r}
#PheWAS file - phenotype files
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,3)], Incident_PheWAS_admission_df, by='eid')
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df = merge(Imaging_date, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df, by='eid')
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df[,-2]

#Model 1
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4:6)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run admission_incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for admission_incident PheWAS 
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

export(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, 'Model_1_admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4:6,14)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run admission_incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for admission_incident PheWAS 
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_2"

export(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, 'Model_2_admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 3
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4:5,11,14,20:24)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run admission_incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for admission_incident PheWAS 
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_3"

export(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, 'Model_3_admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS.csv')
```

7.2.3 Prevalent
```{r}
#PheWAS file - phenotype files

Prevalent_PC2_PheWAS_df = merge(Imaging_date, Prevalent_PC2_PheWAS_df, by='eid')

  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
```

7.2.4 Sex stratified
```{r}
#Predictor file
PC2_sex_rt_df = merge(PC2_rt_df, Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,5)])
PC2_M_rt_df = subset(PC2_sex_rt_df, Sex=='M')
PC2_F_rt_df = subset(PC2_sex_rt_df, Sex=='F')
```

7.2.5 Incident
```{r}
Incident_sex_PC2_PheWAS_df = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,5)], Incident_PC2_PheWAS_df, by='eid')
Incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df = subset(Incident_sex_PC2_PheWAS_df, Sex=='M')
Incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df = Incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df[,-c(2)]
Incident_F_PC2_PheWAS_df = subset(Incident_sex_PC2_PheWAS_df, Sex=='F')
Incident_F_PC2_PheWAS_df = Incident_F_PC2_PheWAS_df[,-c(2)]

#Model 1 - M
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4,6)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for incident PheWAS 
Incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_M_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Incident_PC2_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Incident_PC2_PheWAS)
Incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Incident_PC2_PheWAS, Incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)

Incident_PC2_PheWAS = Incident_PC2_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())
```

```{r}
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_1"

export(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, 'Model_1_admission_incident_female_PC2_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2 - M
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Admission_incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4,6,14)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run admission_incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for admission_incident PheWAS 
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Admission_incident_M_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_M_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS=addPhecodeInfo(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>% arrange(p)

#Add a column with CIs: OR±1.96×SE
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS %>%
  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
         CI_lower = OR - 1.96 * SE) %>%
  select(1:6, CI_lower, CI_upper, everything())

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS[,-c(14:17)]

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$adjustment = "Model_2"

export(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, 'Model_2_admission_incident_male_PC2_PheWAS.csv')

#Model 2 - F
PC2_covariates_df = merge(Admission_incident_F_PC2_PheWAS_df[,1:2], Imp_PC2_regressions_df[,c(1,4,6,14)], by='eid')
PC2_covariates_df = PC2_covariates_df[,-2]

#Run admission_incident PheWAS - change min,records to 100 for admission_incident PheWAS 
Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = phewas(phenotypes = Admission_incident_F_PC2_PheWAS_df, predictors = PC2_F_rt_df, covariates = PC2_covariates_df, additive.genotypes = FALSE, significance.threshold = c("p-value", "bonferroni", "fdr", quick.confint.level=TRUE, min.records=100))

Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS = subset(Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$p.value=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$fdr=="TRUE"&Admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS$n_cases>=100)

  mutate(CI_upper = OR + 1.96 * SE,
```

7.3 PheWAS Volcano plot
```{r}
#Load the imaging-incident df and admission-incident df and subset to cardiometabolic only PheCodes and create two separate volcano plot figures

PheWAS_catalogue_CMD = subset(PheWAS_catalogue, category %in% c("endocrine/metabolic", "circulatory system")) #341 CMD PheCodes

PheWAS_admission_incident_manuscript_model_3 = rbind(Model_3_admission_incident_PC2_PheWAS, Model_3_admission_incident_spine_PheWAS)
PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df = subset(PheWAS_admission_incident_manuscript_model_3, group %in% c("endocrine/metabolic", "circulatory system"))
PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df = arrange(PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df, PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df$p)

#Volcano plot
PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df$log_p <- -log10(PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df$p)

PheWAS_admission_incident_model_3_volcano = PC2_Spine_admission_incident_CMD_PheWAS_df %>% ggplot(aes(x = OR, y = log_p, color = predictor)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p))) + # Add error bars : geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_lower, xmax = CI_upper), height = 1) 
  scale_size(range = c(1, 5)) + 
  labs(x = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
       y = "-log10(p)") +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(1.47e-04), linetype = "dashed", color = "#636363") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("rt_BMFF" = "steelblue", "rt_PC2" = "darkorange"), 
                     labels = c("rt_BMFF" = "Spine BMFF", "rt_PC2" = "PC2")) +
  xlim(0.95, 1.7) +
  ylim(0,60)+
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

PheWAS_admission_incident_model_3_volcano

ggsave("PheWAS_admission_incident_model_3_volcano.png", width = 50, height = 30, units = "cm")
```


8. T2D Cox regressions

8.1 Data wrangling, diagnostics and Kaplan-Meier curves 
--> 8.1.1 Create data frames and set time-to-event/censor dates and times
--> 8.1.2 Diagnostic tests
--> 8.1.3 Tertile thresholding and Kaplan-Meier curves 
     ---> 8.1.3.1 Sex-stratified tertile thresholding
```{r}
#8.1.1 Create data frames

#Imaging-incident - merge with updated 'T2D_df' to get the prevelant cases as 'NA' NOT FALSE! - Also remove any imaging date NAs - 2 found
PC2_imaging_incident_df = merge(Imp_PC2_regressions_df, T2D_df[,c(1:3,5:8)], by='eid')
PC2_imaging_incident_df =  PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Imaging_date)) # removed 1 NA for imaging dates

#Censor date
max(na.omit(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_imaging_incident_T2D)) #2022-10-25
max(na.omit(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_admission_incident_T2D)) #2022-10-25
PC2_imaging_incident_df = PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% mutate(max_follow_up = as.Date('2022-10-26'))

#Get the admission dates for all participants
PC2_imaging_incident_df = merge(PC2_imaging_incident_df, ukb35190_date_assessment_centre[,c(1,2)], by='eid')
colnames(PC2_imaging_incident_df)[32] = 'Admission_date'

#Max follow-up time

#Imaging
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident = PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_follow_up - PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_date 
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_imaging_incident)

#Admission
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident = PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_follow_up - PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_date 
PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$max_time_admission_incident)


#T2D incidence time 

#Imaging
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging = PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_imaging_incident_T2D-PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_date
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_imaging)

#Replace max-time with time to T2D incidence for cases
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor = ifelse(!is.na(T2D_time_to_event_imaging),
                                     T2D_time_to_event_imaging,
                                     max_time_imaging_incident))

PC2_imaging_incident_df$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox <- ifelse(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D, 2, 1)

#Admission
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission = PC2_imaging_incident_df$Date_admission_incident_T2D-PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_date
PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission = as.numeric(PC2_imaging_incident_df$T2D_time_to_event_admission)

#Replace max-time with time to T2D incidence for cases
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(T2D_TOE_admission_censor = ifelse(!is.na(T2D_time_to_event_admission),
                                     T2D_time_to_event_admission,
                                     max_time_admission_incident))

#!! re-code any accidental admission incident T2D cases that are prevalent
PC2_imaging_incident_df <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  mutate(
    T2D_time_to_event_admission = as.numeric(T2D_time_to_event_admission),
    Incident_admission_T2D = ifelse(
      !is.na(T2D_time_to_event_admission) & T2D_time_to_event_admission < 180,
      NA,  # set to NA when time-to-event < 180
      Incident_admission_T2D
    )
  )

PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox <- ifelse(PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D, 2, 1)

#Last check to ensure that imaging and admission incident T2D are >6 months after imaging/admission 
min_time_true <- PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(Incident_admission_T2D == TRUE) %>%
  pull(T2D_time_to_event_admission) %>%
  min(na.rm = TRUE)

min_time_true #183 and 182 for imaging-incident and admission-incident, respectively. 

#PC2 and spine BMFF Model 1, 2, and 3 (change name of data frames below accordingly)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df = PC2_imaging_incident_df
count(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D)
count(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC1 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC1)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC2 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$`PC2.y`)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC3 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC3)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC4 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC4)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BC_PC5 = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC5)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_Total_BMD = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Total_BMD_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_TTFFMVi = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$TTFFMVi)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_VATi = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$VATi_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMI = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$BMI_first_second_imaging)
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_Age = RankNorm(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Age)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df = MV_Cox_PC2_df
colnames(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)[c(4:6,11,14,20:24)] = c("Age", "Sex", "BMI", "TTFFMVi", "Total_BMD", "BC_PC1", "BC_PC2", "BC_PC3", "BC_PC4", "BC_PC5")

export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df = MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df
colnames(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)[c(4:6,11,14,20:24)] = c("Age", "Sex", "BMI", "TTFFMVi", "Total_BMD", "BC_PC1", "BC_PC2", "BC_PC3", "BC_PC4", "BC_PC5")

#8.1.2 Diagnostic tests

#Diagnostics: plot the Beta against time to see if there are any clear and observable associations between time and the Beta for each covariate in the model Model 1 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.014, individual Schoenfeld test show that only BMI violates the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), p=0.0052, however inspection of the beta (BMI) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time
#Model 2 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.019, individual Schoenfeld test show that only BMI violates the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), p=0.005, however inspection of the beta beta (BMI) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time
#Model 3 - Global Schoenfeld test: p=0.112, individual Schoenfeld test show that BC_PC1 and TTFFMVi violate the proportional hazards assumption (Schoenfeld residuals), however inspection of the beta beta (BC_PC1 | TTFFMVi) ~ time plot shows no distinct association with time

#Proportional Hazards assumption
cz <- cox.zph(mv_fit)
print(cz)
ggcoxzph(cz)

#Influential data points
ggcoxdiagnostics(mv_fit, type = "dfbeta",
                 linear.predictions = FALSE, ggtheme = theme_bw(), se=FALSE) #For every continuous exposure variable 

ggcoxdiagnostics(mv_fit, type = "deviance",
                 linear.predictions = FALSE, col=Incident_T2D ,ggtheme = theme_bw()) #Summary plot for the whole model - colour according to T2D status below:

model.data = model.frame(mv_fit)
y = model.data[,1]
event <- y[, "status"] 
model.data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox <- event
model.data$Incident_T2D <- factor(
  model.data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("FALSE", "TRUE")
)

model.data$dev_resid <- residuals(mv_fit, type = "deviance")
model.data$beta_resid <- residuals(mv_fit, type = "dfbeta")
model.data$index <- seq_len(nrow(model.data))

ggplot(model.data, aes(index, dev_resid)) + 
  geom_point(aes(color = Incident_T2D), alpha = .5) +
  theme_bw()

#Linearity using RCS

# Packages
library(survival)
library(rms)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Start from your data frame
# Assumes PC2_T2D_cox_df has columns:
# time, Incident_T2D (0/1), rt_PC2, Age, BMI, Sex, Total_BMD (or similar)
# If names differ, adjust in the rename() below.

# 1) Clean, consistent columns and coding
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df[,c(36,37,39,40,3:6,11,14,20:24)] 
Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df[,c(20,21,23:27,45,29:35)] 

#Sex-stratified
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='F')
PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='M')

Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='F')
Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df = subset(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df, Sex=='M')

# 2) Set datadist for rms
dd <- datadist(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df)
options(datadist = "dd")

# 3) Define spline knots: DO NOT USE THIS FOR MANUSCRIPT/THESIS
#    - Boundary knots at the data min/max
#    - Interior knots at your tertiles
#bmff_min <- min(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, na.rm = TRUE)
#bmff_max <- max(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, na.rm = TRUE)
#bmff_knots <- c(bmff_min, -0.5436456, 1.242564, bmff_max) 

#OR: according to 10.1038/s41409-019-0679-x place the knots in regular intervals between the 5th and 95th percentiles: USE THIS FOR MANUSCRIPT/THESIS
bmff_knots <- quantile(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df$rt_PC2, c(.05, .25, .5, .75, .95), na.rm = TRUE)

# 4) Fit multivariable Cox model with RCS
#    Add/remove covariates as appropriate for your analysis plan
fit <- cph(
  Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ rcs(rt_PC2, parms = bmff_knots) + Age + BMI,
  data = PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df, x = TRUE, y = TRUE
)

#BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi

print(summary(fit))
print(anova(fit))

#PC2

#Imaging-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.448 
#Model 2 = 0.448
#Model 3 = 0.506 

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.187, model 2 = 0.181, model 3 = 0.153
#M-model 1 = 0.617, model 2 = 0.614, model 3 = 0.622

#Admission-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.2343
#Model 2 = 0.2784
#Model 3 = 0.7054

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.1352, model 2 = 0.2515, model 3 = 0.3226
#M-model 1 = 0.8539, model 2 = 0.8542, model 3 = 0.9996

#Spine BMFF

#Imaging-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.741
#Model 2 = 0.750
#Model 3 = 0.775

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.715, model 2 = 0.725, model 3 = 0.749
#M-model 1 = 0.749, model 2 = 0.765, model 3 = 0.786

#Admission-incident

#Both:
#Model 1 = 0.0093
#Model 2 = 0.050
#Model 3 = 0.3508

#Sex-stratified
#F-model 1 = 0.0762, model 2 = 0.1681 , model 3 = 0.3212
#M-model 1 = 0.2141, model 2 = 0.2278, model 3 = 0.3319


# 5) Get HR curve and 95% CI using rms::Predict - https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rms/refman/rms.html#Predict ; boot-strapping is ignored since the original Cox models are not boot-strapped. 
pred <- Predict(fit, rt_PC2, ref.zero = FALSE, fun = exp, np=10000, boot.type="basic")
pred_df <- as.data.frame(pred)

pred_df_M <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    HR    = exp(yhat),
    HR_lo = exp(lower),
    HR_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_M$Sex='M'

pred_df_F <- pred_df %>%
  mutate(
    HR    = exp(yhat),
    HR_lo = exp(lower),
    HR_hi = exp(upper)
  )
pred_df_F$Sex='F'

pred_df = rbind(pred_df_M, pred_df_F)

ggplot(pred_df, aes(x = rt_PC2, y = HR, colour = factor(Sex))) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = HR_lo, ymax = HR_hi, fill = factor(Sex)),
              alpha = 0.2, colour = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "PC2 (rank-normalized)",
    y = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)",
    colour = "Sex",
    fill   = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male\np(non-linearity) = 0.854",
               "F" = "Female\np(non-linearity) = 0.135")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("M" = "#0075B2", "F" = "darkred"),
    labels = c("M" = "Male\np(non-linearity) = 0.854",
               "F" = "Female\np(non-linearity) = 0.135")
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.8),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "lines")
  )


#8.1.3 Tertile thresholding and Kaplan-Meier curves 

#ROC curves to optimise the tertile thresholding based on the mv-cox models - run for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately

#Make sure that the length of response and predictor variables for imaging-incident and admission-incident are the same, since any prevalent cases were re-coded as 'NA'

#Spine BMFF
adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

#PC2
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

#Set the tertiles breaks to either -Inf or Inf or min or max of the exposure for the same result
min_exposure = min(adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF)
max_exposure = max(adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF)

# Define the function to calculate AUC for given thresholds
calculate_auc <- function(thresholds) {
  tertiles <- cut(
    adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
    breaks = c(-Inf, thresholds, Inf),
    include.lowest = TRUE
  )
  # Fit the Cox model
  mv_fit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ tertiles * Sex + Age,
    data = adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
  )
  # Calculate the linear predictor
  lp <- predict(mv_fit, type = "lp")
  # Get ROC curve and AUC
  roc_curve <- roc(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox, lp)
  auc(roc_curve)
}

# Select potential thresholds based on quantiles: use either 0.01/0.1 and 0.9/0.99 by=0.1 for slightly different thresholds but similar AUC --> I stuck to 0.1 and 0.9 since it took a bit less time to compute 
possible_thresholds <- quantile(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1))

best_auc <- 0
best_thresholds <- NULL

# Iterate over threshold combinations
for (t1 in possible_thresholds) {
  for (t2 in possible_thresholds) {
    if (t1 < t2) {
      current_auc <- calculate_auc(c(t1, t2))
      if (current_auc > best_auc) {
        best_auc <- current_auc
        best_thresholds <- c(t1, t2)
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("Best AUC:", best_auc, "with thresholds:", best_thresholds, "\n")

#Determine the best AUC for the thresholds - these are the same for all adjustment models for spine BMFF and PC2, hence use any of them (model 1 shown) - re-run without BMI for direct WHR tertile comparison

#PC2 admission incident: AUC=0.7727346; -0.0106823, 1.262787 
#PC2 imaging incident: AUC=0.76035; -0.5436456, 1.242564; AUC=0.6710972 with thresholds: -0.8610551 0.4976318 for no BMI

#Spine admission incident: AUC=0.7590104; 0.244955, 1.271262
#Spine imaging incident: AUC=0.75504; -0.5392428, 1.257695


cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.8610551, 0.4976318, Inf)

# Use the cut function to create tertiles
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')
export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')

#Kaplan-Meier curve model for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately

#Imaging incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Admission incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_PC2*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Admission_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Admission incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Incident_admission_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Admission_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Imaging incident
KM_curve_imaging_incident_df = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df %>% filter(!is.na(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Incident_T2D))
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident, data = KM_curve_imaging_incident_df)
km_fit
summary(km_fit)

mv_fit <- coxph(Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)~rt_BMFF*Sex+Age+Total_BMD+BC_PC1+BC_PC2+BC_PC3+BC_PC4+BC_PC5+TTFFMVi, data=Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df)
mv_fit
summary(mv_fit)

#Find last date of T2D diagnosis
test = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox==2)

#Get the cumulative event rates across all three tertiles: 

# 1) KM output
km_sum <- summary(km_fit)

# 2) Build data.frame of all KM steps
df_km <- data.frame(
  strata  = km_sum$strata,   #
  time    = km_sum$time,
  surv    = km_sum$surv,
  lower_s = km_sum$lower,
  upper_s = km_sum$upper
)

# 3) Take the last time-point for when T2D was recorded per tertile (end of follow‑up for that tertile)
event_rates <- df_km %>%
  group_by(strata) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%       # one row per T1, T2, T3
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    tertile = sub(".*=", "", strata),       # T1 / T2 / T3
    event_rate_pct      = (1 - surv)    * 100,
    event_rate_lower_ci = (1 - upper_s) * 100,  # upper S → lower event
    event_rate_upper_ci = (1 - lower_s) * 100   # lower S → upper event
  ) %>%
  select(tertile, time, event_rate_pct, event_rate_lower_ci, event_rate_upper_ci)

#Spine
#Cumulative imaging-incident event rates for T1 = 1.563% (1.181%, 1.944%); T2 = 2.632% (2.013%, 3.246%); T3 = 3.525% (2.276%, 4.757%)
#Cumulative admission-incident event rates for T1 = 3.281% (2.511%, 4.046%); T2 = 4.492% (4.145%, 4.839%); T3 = 7.550% (6.350%, 8.734%)

#PC2
#Cumulative imaging-incident event rates for T1 = 1.574% (1.107%, 2.039%); T2 = 2.422% (1.758%, 3.080%); T3 = 3.914% (2.763%, 5.051%)
#Cumulative admission-incident event rates for T1 = 2.848% (2.502%, 3.192%); T2 = 4.499 (4.057%, 4.938%); T3 = 8.521% (7.532%, 9.450%)

max(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$T2D_TOE_admission_censor) #3100/3102 for spine and PC2, respectively (set xlim to 3103, ylim to 0.9475) for imaging incident; 6066 (set xlim to 6067, ylim to 0.90) for admission incident

# Plot the Kaplan-Meier curve

#Spine

#Admission-incident
p <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit, 
  data = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  xlab = "Days",
  ylab = "Disease-free probability of T2D",
  risk.table = FALSE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  palette = c("steelblue", "#ebbe4d", "darkred"),
  #palette = c("#b5cde1", "steelblue", "#23415a"),
  ggtheme = theme_bw(),
  ylim = c(0.90, 1.0),
  xlim = c(0, 5601),
  legend.title = "Spine BMFF tertiles:",
  legend.labs = c(
    "T1",
    "T2",
    "T3"
  ),
  legend = "bottom",
  font.x = c(24, "bold"),
  font.y = c(24, "bold"),
  font.tickslab = c(24, "bold"),   # <- same size as other text
  font.legend = c(24, "bold")
)

p$plot <- p$plot +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(lineheight = 0.9),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
  )

p

  ),

)

p$plot <- p$plot +
  scale_y_continuous(

  ) +

                  )+

  )

p

  font.tickslab = c(24, "bold"),   # <- same size as other text
  font.legend = c(24, "bold")
)

p$plot <- p$plot +
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(lineheight = 0.9),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
  )

p

#Imaging-incident
p <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit, 
  data = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  xlab = "Days",
  ylab = "Disease-free probability of T2D",
  risk.table = FALSE,
  pval = TRUE,
  conf.int = TRUE,
  palette = c("steelblue", "#ebbe4d", "darkred"),
  ggtheme = theme_bw(),
  ylim = c(0.945, 1.0),          # data/plot range
  xlim = c(0, 2970),
  legend.title = "PC2 tertiles:",
  legend.labs = c(
    "T1",
    "T2",
    "T3"
  ),
  legend = "bottom",
  font.x = c(24, "bold"),
  font.y = c(24, "bold"),
  font.tickslab = c(24, "bold"),
  font.legend = c(24, "bold")
)

p$plot <- p$plot +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0.95, 1.00, by = 0.01)  
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.948, 1.0)
                  )+
  theme(
    legend.text  = element_text(lineheight = 0.9),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")
  )

p

#8.1.3.1 Determine the optimal tertile thresholding for males and females separately

#PC2
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='M')
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='F')

#Spine
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='M')
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M = subset(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, Sex=='F')

#Match length of response and predictor variables for imaging-incident and admission-incident separately - since any prevalent cases were re-coded as 'NA'

#Admission-incident
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Admission_incident_T2D_cox))

#Imaging-incident
adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

adapted_Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df <-
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df_M %>%
  filter(!is.na(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox))

# Define the function to calculate AUC for given thresholds - change between PC2 and and Spine data frames and exposures
calculate_auc <- function(thresholds) {
  tertiles <- cut(
    adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2,
    breaks = c(-Inf, thresholds, Inf),
    include.lowest = TRUE
  )
  # Fit the Cox model
  mv_fit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor,Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ tertiles + Age,
    data = adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
  )
  # Calculate the linear predictor
  lp <- predict(mv_fit, type = "lp")
  # Get ROC curve and AUC
  roc_curve <- roc(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Admission_incident_T2D_cox, lp)
  auc(roc_curve)
}

# Select potential thresholds based on quantiles: use either 0.01/0.1 and 0.9/0.99 by=0.1 for slightly different thresholds but similar AUC --> I stuck to 0.1 and 0.9 since it took a bit less time to compute 
possible_thresholds <- quantile(adapted_Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1))

best_auc <- 0
best_thresholds <- NULL

# Iterate over threshold combinations
for (t1 in possible_thresholds) {
  for (t2 in possible_thresholds) {
    if (t1 < t2) {
      current_auc <- calculate_auc(c(t1, t2))
      if (current_auc > best_auc) {
        best_auc <- current_auc
        best_thresholds <- c(t1, t2)
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("Best AUC:", best_auc, "with thresholds:", best_thresholds, "\n")

#Determine the best AUC for the thresholds - these are the same for all adjustment models for spine BMFF and PC2, hence use any of them (model 1 shown) - re-run without BMI for WHR comparison (see code chunks on WHR further down)

#PC2 admission incident: Male: AUC= 0.723343 with thresholds: -0.7224048 0.2859591; AUC=0.6620802 with thresholds: -0.7224048 -0.004709717 for no BMI adjustment male; Female: AUC= 0.801814 with thresholds: 0.5530352 1.47736
#PC2 imaging incident: Male: AUC=0.7217124 with thresholds: -0.7412716 0.6802662; AUC=0.6288814 with thresholds: -0.7412716, 0.2613439 for no BMI adjustment male; Female: AUC=0.7717417 with thresholds: 0.5393633 1.064921

cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.7412716, 0.2613439, Inf)

# Create an empty factor column with desired levels
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- 
  factor(NA, levels = c("T1", "T2", "T3"))

# Logical index for males
idx_male <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$Sex == "M"

# Assign tertiles only for males
Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident[idx_male] <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df$rt_PC2[idx_male],
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_PC2_df.csv')

#Spine admission incident: Male: AUC=0.7211237 with thresholds: -0.5152584 0.5331987; Female: AUC=0.7821997 with thresholds: -0.579208 1.03752; AUC=0.6298782 with thresholds: -0.2651101, 1.03752 for no BMI adjustment female
#Spine imaging incident: Male: AUC=0.7244997 with thresholds: -0.5300379 0.5093545; Female: AUC=0.7655692 with thresholds: -0.5848508 1.428819; 

cut_offs <- c(-Inf, -0.2651101, 1.03752, Inf)

# Create an empty factor column with desired levels
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident <- 
  factor(NA, levels = c("T1", "T2", "T3"))

# Logical index for males
idx_male <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Sex == "F"

# Assign tertiles only for males
Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident[idx_male] <- cut(
  Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df$rt_BMFF[idx_male],
  breaks = cut_offs,
  include.lowest = TRUE,
  labels = c("T1", "T2", "T3")
)

export(Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df, 'MV_Cox_Spine_BMFF_df.csv')
```


8.2 Count cases and controls
```{r}
#Count the number of cases and controls for spine BMFF and PC2 using the for-loop below:

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

##------------------------------------------------
## Helper function: count TRUE/FALSE per tertile
##------------------------------------------------
count_tertiles <- function(dat, tert_cols,
                           imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
                           admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D") {

  results_list <- list()
  k <- 1L

  for (tc in tert_cols) {

    if (!tc %in% names(dat)) next

    # Decide which Incident variable to use: imaging vs admission
    incident_var <- if (grepl("admission", tc)) admission_incident else imaging_incident
    if (!incident_var %in% names(dat)) next

    tmp <- dat %>%
      # keep rows where tertile and relevant incident var are not NA
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[tc]]), !is.na(.data[[incident_var]])) %>%
      # group by tertile and incident TRUE/FALSE
      dplyr::group_by(
        tertile = .data[[tc]],
        Incident = .data[[incident_var]]
      ) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        names_from  = Incident,
        values_from = n,
        values_fill = 0
      )

    # Ensure both TRUE and FALSE columns exist, then rename
    if (!"FALSE" %in% names(tmp)) tmp$`FALSE` <- 0L
    if (!"TRUE"  %in% names(tmp))  tmp$`TRUE`  <- 0L

    tmp <- tmp %>%
      dplyr::rename(
        n_FALSE = `FALSE`,
        n_TRUE  = `TRUE`
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        tertile_var  = tc,
        incident_var = incident_var
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(tertile_var, incident_var, tertile, n_TRUE, n_FALSE)

    results_list[[k]] <- tmp
    k <- k + 1L
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
}

##------------------------------------------------
## 1) PC2 tertiles in Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
##------------------------------------------------

pc2_tert_cols <- c(
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

pc2_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = pc2_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "PC2")

##------------------------------------------------
## 2) Spine tertiles in Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
##------------------------------------------------

spine_tert_cols <- c(
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

spine_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = spine_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "Spine")

##------------------------------------------------
## Combined table: PC2 + Spine
##------------------------------------------------
tertile_T2D_counts_all <- bind_rows(pc2_counts, spine_counts)

tertile_T2D_counts_all

#Count number of cases and controls for admission and imaging incident in males and females

# Input datasets
datasets <- list(
  PC2   = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  Spine = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
)

# Outcome variables to count
outcomes <- c("Incident_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D")

# Sex strata to report
sexes <- c("F", "M", "Both")

results <- list()

idx <- 1
for (dname in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[dname]]
  
  for (outcome in outcomes) {
    for (sx in sexes) {
      df_sub <- df
      
      # Filter by sex unless "Both"
      if (sx != "Both") {
        df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(Sex == sx)
      }
      
      # Keep rows with non-missing outcome
      df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))
      
      # Counts (cases = TRUE, controls = FALSE)
      cases <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'TRUE', na.rm = TRUE)
      controls <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'FALSE', na.rm = TRUE)
      total <- cases + controls
      
      results[[idx]] <- tibble(
        dataset = dname,
        outcome = outcome,
        sex = sx,
        cases = cases,
        controls = controls,
        total = total
      )
      idx <- idx + 1
    }
  }
}

counts_summary <- bind_rows(results)
counts_summary
```


8.3 For-loop that runs multivariate Cox-regressions across PC2 and spine BMFF and admission and imaging incident and both sexes and in males and females separately
```{r}
library(survival)
library(dplyr)

#----------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: extract Cox results for a set of terms
#----------------------------------------------------------
extract_terms <- function(fit, analysis_id, outcome_type, exposure_type,
                          sex_stratum, model_label, terms) {
  s  <- summary(fit)
  cf <- as.data.frame(s$coefficients)
  ci <- as.data.frame(s$conf.int)

  cf$term <- rownames(cf)

  out <- cf %>%
    dplyr::filter(term %in% terms) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      HR  = ci[term, "exp(coef)"],
      LCL = ci[term, "lower .95"],
      UCL = ci[term, "upper .95"],
      p   = `Pr(>|z|)`
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(term, HR, LCL, UCL, p)

  out$analysis_id   <- analysis_id
  out$outcome_type  <- outcome_type      # "imaging" / "admission"
  out$exposure_type <- exposure_type     # "PC2" / "Spine"
  out$sex_stratum   <- sex_stratum       # "All" / "M" / "F"
  out$model_label   <- model_label       # "Model1_cont", ...

  out[, c("analysis_id", "outcome_type", "exposure_type",
          "sex_stratum", "model_label", "term", "HR", "LCL", "UCL", "p")]
}

#==========================================================
# SPECS FOR IMAGING-INCIDENT AND ADMISSION-INCIDENT
#==========================================================

# Overall (all sexes)
overall_specs_imaging <- list(
  list(
    exposure_type = "PC2",
    df           = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_PC2",
    tert_var     = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Total_BMD"
  ),
  list(
    exposure_type = "Spine",
    df           = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_BMFF",
    tert_var     = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Spine_BMD"
  )
)

overall_specs_admission <- list(
  list(
    exposure_type = "PC2",
    df           = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_PC2",
    tert_var     = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Total_BMD"
  ),
  list(
    exposure_type = "Spine",
    df           = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
    cont_var     = "rt_BMFF",
    tert_var     = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    bmd_var      = "Spine_BMD"
  )
)

# Sex-stratified
sex_specs_imaging <- expand.grid(
  exposure_type = c("PC2", "Spine"),
  sex           = c("M", "F"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

sex_specs_admission <- sex_specs_imaging  # same structure

#==========================================================
# 1. IMAGING-INCIDENT ANALYSES
#==========================================================

##-------------------------------
## 1A. Overall (all sexes)
##-------------------------------
res_overall_cox_imaging <- list()

for (sp in overall_specs_imaging) {
  dat      <- sp$df
  exposure <- sp$exposure_type
  cont_x   <- sp$cont_var
  tert_x   <- sp$tert_var
  bmd_x    <- sp$bmd_var

  # Continuous – Model 1
  f_cont_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      cont_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m1 <- coxph(f_cont_m1, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 2
  f_cont_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m2 <- coxph(f_cont_m2, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M2_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m2,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model2_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 3
  f_cont_m3 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m3 <- coxph(f_cont_m3, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M3_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m3,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model3_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 1
  f_tert_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      tert_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m1 <- coxph(f_tert_m1, data = dat)
  term_T2 <- paste0(tert_x, "T2")
  term_T3 <- paste0(tert_x, "T3")

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 2
  f_tert_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
      tert_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m2 <- coxph(f_tert_m2, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M2_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m2,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model2_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 3
  f_tert_m3 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      tert_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m3 <- coxph(f_tert_m3, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_imaging[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M3_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m3,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model3_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )
}

res_overall_cox_imaging <- bind_rows(res_overall_cox_imaging)

##-------------------------------
## 1B. Sex-stratified
##-------------------------------
res_sex_cox_imaging <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(sex_specs_imaging))) {
  sp_name <- sex_specs_imaging$exposure_type[i]
  sex_i   <- sex_specs_imaging$sex[i]

  if (sp_name == "PC2") {
    dat_all <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
    cont_x  <- "rt_PC2"
    bmd_x   <- "Total_BMD"
    tert_M  <- "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident"
    tert_F  <- "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident"
  } else {
    dat_all <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
    cont_x  <- "rt_BMFF"
    bmd_x   <- "Spine_BMD"
    tert_M  <- "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident"
    tert_F  <- "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident"
  }

  dat <- dat_all %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == sex_i)
  tert_x_sex <- if (sex_i == "M") tert_M else tert_F

  # Continuous – Model 1
  f_cont_m1_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI",
      cont_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m1_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m1_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M1_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m1_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model1_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 2
  f_cont_m2_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI + %s",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m2_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m2_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M2_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m2_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model2_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 3
  f_cont_m3_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m3_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m3_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M3_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m3_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model3_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 1
  f_tert_m1_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI",
      tert_x_sex
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m1_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m1_sex, data = dat)
  term_T2_sex <- paste0(tert_x_sex, "T2")
  term_T3_sex <- paste0(tert_x_sex, "T3")

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M1_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m1_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model1_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 2
  f_tert_m2_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI + %s",
      tert_x_sex, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m2_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m2_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M2_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m2_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model2_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 3
  f_tert_m3_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      tert_x_sex, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m3_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m3_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_imaging[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M3_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m3_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "imaging",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model3_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )
}

res_sex_cox_imaging <- bind_rows(res_sex_cox_imaging)

cox_results_imaging <- bind_rows(res_overall_cox_imaging, res_sex_cox_imaging)

#==========================================================
# 2. ADMISSION-INCIDENT ANALYSES (same models, new vars)
#==========================================================

##-------------------------------
## 2A. Overall
##-------------------------------
res_overall_cox_admission <- list()

for (sp in overall_specs_admission) {
  dat      <- sp$df
  exposure <- sp$exposure_type
  cont_x   <- sp$cont_var
  tert_x   <- sp$tert_var
  bmd_x    <- sp$bmd_var

  # Continuous – Model 1
  f_cont_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      cont_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m1 <- coxph(f_cont_m1, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 2
  f_cont_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m2 <- coxph(f_cont_m2, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M2_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m2,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model2_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 3
  f_cont_m3 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m3 <- coxph(f_cont_m3, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M3_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m3,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model3_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 1
  f_tert_m1 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI",
      tert_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m1 <- coxph(f_tert_m1, data = dat)
  term_T2 <- paste0(tert_x, "T2")
  term_T3 <- paste0(tert_x, "T3")

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M1_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m1,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model1_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 2
  f_tert_m2 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + BMI + %s",
      tert_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m2 <- coxph(f_tert_m2, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M2_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m2,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model2_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 3
  f_tert_m3 <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s*Sex + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      tert_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m3 <- coxph(f_tert_m3, data = dat)

  res_overall_cox_admission[[paste0("overall_", exposure, "_M3_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m3,
      analysis_id   = paste0("overall_", exposure),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = exposure,
      sex_stratum   = "All",
      model_label   = "Model3_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2, term_T3)
    )
}

res_overall_cox_admission <- bind_rows(res_overall_cox_admission)

##-------------------------------
## 2B. Sex-stratified
##-------------------------------
res_sex_cox_admission <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(sex_specs_admission))) {
  sp_name <- sex_specs_admission$exposure_type[i]
  sex_i   <- sex_specs_admission$sex[i]

  if (sp_name == "PC2") {
    dat_all <- Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df
    cont_x  <- "rt_PC2"
    bmd_x   <- "Total_BMD"
    tert_M  <- "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident"
    tert_F  <- "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
  } else {
    dat_all <- Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df
    cont_x  <- "rt_BMFF"
    bmd_x   <- "Spine_BMD"
    tert_M  <- "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident"
    tert_F  <- "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
  }

  dat <- dat_all %>% dplyr::filter(Sex == sex_i)
  tert_x_sex <- if (sex_i == "M") tert_M else tert_F

  # Continuous – Model 1
  f_cont_m1_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI",
      cont_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m1_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m1_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M1_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m1_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model1_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 2
  f_cont_m2_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI + %s",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m2_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m2_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M2_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m2_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model2_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Continuous – Model 3
  f_cont_m3_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      cont_x, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_cont_m3_sex <- coxph(f_cont_m3_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M3_cont")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_cont_m3_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model3_cont",
      terms         = cont_x
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 1
  f_tert_m1_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI",
      tert_x_sex
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m1_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m1_sex, data = dat)
  term_T2_sex <- paste0(tert_x_sex, "T2")
  term_T3_sex <- paste0(tert_x_sex, "T3")

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M1_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m1_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model1_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 2
  f_tert_m2_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + BMI + %s",
      tert_x_sex, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m2_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m2_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M2_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m2_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model2_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )

  # Tertiles – Model 3
  f_tert_m3_sex <- as.formula(
    sprintf(
      "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ %s + Age + %s +
       BC_PC1 + BC_PC2 + BC_PC3 + BC_PC4 + BC_PC5 + TTFFMVi",
      tert_x_sex, bmd_x
    )
  )
  fit_tert_m3_sex <- coxph(f_tert_m3_sex, data = dat)

  res_sex_cox_admission[[paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i, "_M3_tert")]] <-
    extract_terms(
      fit_tert_m3_sex,
      analysis_id   = paste0("sex_", sp_name, "_", sex_i),
      outcome_type  = "admission",
      exposure_type = sp_name,
      sex_stratum   = sex_i,
      model_label   = "Model3_tertiles",
      terms         = c(term_T2_sex, term_T3_sex)
    )
}

res_sex_cox_admission <- bind_rows(res_sex_cox_admission)

cox_results_admission <- bind_rows(res_overall_cox_admission, res_sex_cox_admission)

#==========================================================
# FINAL: separate result data frames
#==========================================================
# Imaging-incident Cox results (Models 1–3, PC2/Spine, overall & sex-stratified)
cox_results_imaging

# Admission-incident Cox results (Models 1–3, PC2/Spine, overall & sex-stratified)
cox_results_admission

```

8.4 Present the PC2 and Spine BMFF tertile and normalised exposures forest plot
```{r}
#Imaging incident
Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), 
  Predictor = c("Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "PC2", "PC2", "PC2", "PC2"),
  Exposure = c("Spine T1 (ref)", "Spine T2", "Spine T3", "Spine Rank-normalized", "PC2 T1 (ref)", "PC2 T2", "PC2 T3", "PC2 Rank-normalized"),
  Exposure_type = c("T1", "T2", "T3", "normalized", "T1", "T2", "T3", "normalized"),
  OR = c(1.000, 1.631, 2.298, 1.229, 1.000, 1.834, 3.244, 1.414),
  LL = c(1.000, 1.053, 1.371, 1.048, 1.000, 0.955, 1.642, 1.190),
  UL = c(1.000, 2.526, 3.853, 1.427, 1.000, 3.524, 6.408, 1.681),
  p = c(0.075, 0.028, 1.6e-3, 0.011, 0.075, 0.069, 7e-4, 8.53e-5)
)

#Admission incident
Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df <- data.frame(
  Index = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8), 
  Predictor = c("Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "Spine BMFF", "PC2", "PC2", "PC2", "PC2"),
  Exposure = c("Spine T1 (ref)", "Spine T2", "Spine T3", "Spine Rank-normalized", "PC2 T1 (ref)", "PC2 T2", "PC2 T3", "PC2 Rank-normalized"),
  Exposure_type = c("T1", "T2", "T3", "normalized", "T1", "T2", "T3", "normalized"),
  OR = c(1.000, 1.240, 2.061, 1.367, 1.000, 1.793, 3.857, 1.814),
  LL = c(1.000, 1.032, 1.674, 1.254, 1.000, 1.392, 2.972, 1.651),
  UL = c(1.000, 1.490, 2.537, 1.490, 1.000, 2.309, 5.006, 1.992),
  p = c(0.075, 0.022, 9.47e-12, 1.29e-12, 0.075, 6.08e-06, 3.40e-24, 1.84e-35)
)

Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df = Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df[c(1,5,2,6,3,7,4,8),]
Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df$Index = seq_along(Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df$Index)

#Imaging-incident
p = ggplot(Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df, aes(y = Index, x = OR, col = Predictor)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = 7)) +  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "darkred", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab("Hazard Ratio (95% CI)") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 25, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.text  = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = "steelblue", "PC2" = "darkorange"),
                     labels = c("Spine BMFF" = "Spine BMFF", "PC2" = "PC2"))+
  scale_y_reverse()+
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 4.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 6.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  xlim(-1,6.5)+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=1, label="Spine BMFF T1\n (ref)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=2, label="PC2 T1\n (ref)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=3, label="Spine BMFF T2\n HR = 1.631 (1.053, 2.526)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=4, label="PC2 T2\n HR = 1.834 (0.955, 3.524)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=5, label="Spine BMFF T3\n HR = 2.298 (1.371, 3.853)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=6, label="PC2 T3\n HR = 3.244 (1.642, 6.408)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=7, label="Spine BMFF (normalized)\n HR = 1.229 (1.048, 1.427)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=8, label="PC2 T2 (normalized)\nHR = 1.414 (1.190, 1.681)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())

p
  
ggsave(
  filename = "Cox_imaging_incident_T2D.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 20,
  height = 12
)

#Admission incident
p = ggplot(Spine_BMFF_PC2_PRSCS_A_B_C_D_T2D_df, aes(y = Index, x = OR, col = Predictor)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=7)) +  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = LL, xmax = UL), height = 0) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "darkred", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  xlab("Hazard Ratio (95% CI)") + 
  ylab(" ") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.title = element_text(size = 25, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  theme(legend.text  = element_text(size = 25,face = "bold")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = "steelblue", "PC2" = "darkorange"),
                     labels = c("Spine BMFF" = "Spine BMFF", "PC2" = "PC2"))+
  scale_y_reverse()+
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 5))) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 4.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 6.5, color = "lightgray", linetype = "dashed", cex = 0.5)+
  xlim(-1,6.5)+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=1, label="Spine BMFF T1\n (ref)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=2, label="PC2 T1\n (ref)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=3, label="Spine BMFF T2\n HR = 1.240 (1.032, 1.490)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=4, label="PC2 T2\n HR = 1.793 (1.392, 2.309)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=5, label="Spine BMFF T3\n HR = 2.061 (1.674, 2.537)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=6, label="PC2 T3\n HR = 3.857 (2.972, 5.006)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=7, label="Spine BMFF (normalized)\n HR = 1.367 (1.254, 1.490)", color="steelblue", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  annotate(geom="text", x=-0.25, y=8, label="PC2 T2 (normalized)\nHR = 1.814 (1.651, 1.992)", color="darkorange", size = 9, fontface = "bold")+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())

p

ggsave(
  filename = "Cox_admission_incident_T2D.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 20,
  height = 12
)
```

8.4 Model performance: calculate cross-validated (k-fold cross validation) predictive performance metrics (AUC) of Cox models and calculate the C-statistics and generate calibration plots using cross-validated linear predictors
```{r}
#Model performance evaluation - - use type = "risk" or "lp" for the predict() function of coxph to get the predicted risk score (relative hazard at time t - in this case the risk of ever developing T2D during the whole follow‑up) for the outcome --> The current AUC = “How well do the Cox risk scores separate people who ever get T2D during follow‑up from those who never do?”

#AUC when training the model on a training data subset and testing it on a testing subset = 0.7665 (0.7227, 0.8102)

#k-Fold Cross-Validation approach --> more robust for improved internal validity (https://www.bmj.com/content/386/bmj-2023-078276 ; https://www.bmj.com/content/384/bmj-2023-074819) - do not split into training and test data sets as I am not tuning any model hyperparameters as you would for model selection using penalised regression (e.g., LASSO, Ridge, elastic net), where it is more appropriate to tune the hyperparameters in a separate data set to the one where you assess the model performance (such as nested cross-validation). Here I am running the model on the whole data set and then calculating the AUC using the same model parameters and then running the k-fold cross-validation to obtain the optimism corrected AUCs (which are lower than the AUCs calculated from the test data set from above).  

#Reasons for why I can't use the k-fold CV-ed linear predictors in the predict() function for the test-data subset:
#The cross-validated lp are an ensemble of fold-specific predictions only for training data, not for any new/unseen data.
#To compute a meaningful AUC on the test set using lp, you would need a single scoring function that maps test-set covariates to a risk score. In CV, each observation in the training data has an lp from a fold-specific model where that observation was in the test set. There’s no one model trained on the full training data (or on a predefined subset) whose lp you can apply to the test set unless you refit on the training data or construct an ensemble in a principled way (e.g., average lp from fold-models trained on training folds and then apply to the test data). Without that, you’re effectively using inconsistent scores.
#If you naively mix CV lp with test-set outcomes, you risk optimistic or biased performance estimates. The CV process is designed to provide an unbiased estimate of out-of-sample performance for the training procedure, but once you apply those CV-derived scores to a separate test set, you break the intended interpretation of the CV estimate.

#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#Spine BMFF - both sexes and in males and females separately
#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

library(caret)
library(survival)
library(pROC)

set.seed(123)

#Change based on imaging or admission incident data as the prevalent T2D numbers differ
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(1,2,5:15)]) #imaging incident
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(3:15)]) #admission incident

train_data <- Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1 #Spine BMFF data frame: use Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df for PC2 (rt_PC2 as the primary exposure variable)

k <- 10
folds <- createFolds(train_data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox, k = k, list = TRUE) #Create folds for Imaging_incident_T2D_cox variable when running cox models with T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox below

# one out-of-sample prediction per training subject
cv_risk_train <- numeric(nrow(train_data))

for (i in seq_len(k)) {
  # fold i is the TEST portion within training
  test_indices_fold  <- folds[[i]]
  train_indices_fold <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(train_data)), test_indices_fold)
  
  train_fold <- train_data[train_indices_fold, ]
  test_fold  <- train_data[test_indices_fold, ]
```
