
8.6 Count number of cases and controls in each tertile (for both, males and females separately)
```{r}
function(dat, tert_cols,
                           imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
                           admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D") {

  results_list <- list()
  k <- 1L

  for (tc in tert_cols) {

if (!tc %in% names(dat)) next

# Decide which Incident variable to use: imaging vs admission
incident_var <- if (grepl("admission", tc)) admission_incident else imaging_incident
if (!incident_var %in% names(dat)) next

tmp <- dat %>%
  # keep rows where tertile and relevant incident var are not NA
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[tc]]), !is.na(.data[[incident_var]])) %>%
  # group by tertile and incident TRUE/FALSE
  dplyr::group_by(
    tertile = .data[[tc]],
    Incident = .data[[incident_var]]
  ) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Incident,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )

# Ensure both TRUE and FALSE columns exist, then rename
if (!"FALSE" %in% names(tmp)) tmp$`FALSE` <- 0L
if (!"TRUE"  %in% names(tmp))  tmp$`TRUE`  <- 0L

tmp <- tmp %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    n_FALSE = `FALSE`,
    n_TRUE  = `TRUE`
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    tertile_var  = tc,
    incident_var = incident_var
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(tertile_var, incident_var, tertile, n_TRUE, n_FALSE)

results_list[[k]] <- tmp
k <- k + 1L


  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
}

##------------------------------------------------

#1) PC2 tertiles in Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df

##------------------------------------------------

pc2_tert_cols <- c(
 "PC2_optimal_tertiles_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_admission_incident",
   "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

pc2_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = pc2_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "PC2")

##------------------------------------------------

#2) Spine tertiles in Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df

##------------------------------------------------

spine_tert_cols <- c(
    "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
   "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
   "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
    "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

spine_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = spine_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "Spine")

##------------------------------------------------

#3) WHR tertiles in WHR_imaging_incident_df

##------------------------------------------------

WHR_tert_cols <- c(
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
  "WHR_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
)

WHR_counts <- count_tertiles(
  dat       = WHR_imaging_incident_df,
  tert_cols = WHR_tert_cols,
  imaging_incident   = "Incident_T2D",
  admission_incident = "Incident_admission_T2D"
) %>%
  mutate(exposure = "WHR")

##------------------------------------------------

#Combined table: PC2 + Spine + WHR

##------------------------------------------------
tertile_WHR_T2D_counts_all <- bind_rows(pc2_counts, spine_counts, WHR_counts)
export(tertile_WHR_T2D_counts_all, 'results.xlsx')

#Count number of cases and controls for admission and imaging incident in males and females

# Input datasets
datasets <- list(
  PC2   = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
  Spine = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
  WHR = WHR_imaging_incident_df
)

# Outcome variables to count
outcomes <- c("Incident_T2D", "Incident_admission_T2D")

# Sex strata to report
sexes <- c("F", "M", "Both")

results <- list()

idx <- 1
for (dname in names(datasets)) {
  df <- datasets[[dname]]
  
  for (outcome in outcomes) {
    for (sx in sexes) {
      df_sub <- df
      
      # Filter by sex unless "Both"
      if (sx != "Both") {
        df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(Sex == sx)
      }
      
      # Keep rows with non-missing outcome
      df_sub <- df_sub %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))
      
      # Counts (cases = TRUE, controls = FALSE)
      cases <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'TRUE', na.rm = TRUE)
      controls <- sum(df_sub[[outcome]] == 'FALSE', na.rm = TRUE)
      total <- cases + controls
      
      results[[idx]] <- tibble(
        dataset = dname,
        outcome = outcome,
        sex = sx,
        cases = cases,
        controls = controls,
        total = total
      )
      idx <- idx + 1
    }
  }
}

counts_summary <- bind_rows(results)
counts_summary

```


8.7 Forloop to get k-fold cross-validated AUCs 
--> 8.7.1 Calculate the k-fold cross-validated AUCs
--> 8.7.2 Plot ROC curves 
```{r}
#8.7.1 Calculate the k-fold cross-validated AUCs

library(survival)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

set.seed(123)

#----------------------------------
# 1. Exposure datasets and variables
#----------------------------------

exposure_specs <- list(
  Spine = list(
    data = Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df,
    expo = "rt_BMFF",
    # tertiles
    tert_imaging_overall   = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_M         = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_F         = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
    tert_admission_overall = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_M       = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_F       = "Spine_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
  ),
  PC2 = list(
    data = Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df,
    expo = "rt_PC2",
    tert_imaging_overall   = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_M         = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_F         = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
    tert_admission_overall = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_M       = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_M_no_BMI_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_F       = "PC2_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
  ),
  WHR = list(
    data = WHR_imaging_incident_df,
    expo = "rt_WHR",
    tert_imaging_overall   = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_M         = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_M_imaging_incident",
    tert_imaging_F         = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_F_imaging_incident",
    tert_admission_overall = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_M       = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_M_admission_incident",
    tert_admission_F       = "WHR_optimal_tertiles_F_admission_incident"
  )
)

#-------------------------------
# 2. Outcomes and Surv() pieces
#-------------------------------

outcome_specs <- list(
  imaging = list(
    surv   = "Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox)",
    time   = "T2D_TOE_imaging_censor",
    event  = "Imaging_incident_T2D_cox"
  ),
  admission = list(
    surv   = "Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox)",
    time   = "T2D_TOE_admission_censor",
    event  = "Admission_incident_T2D_cox"
  )
)

sex_groups  <- c("All", "M", "F")
model_types <- c("continuous", "tertiles")
k <- 10L

#-------------------------------
# 3. Helper to pick tertile var
#-------------------------------

get_tert_var <- function(exp_spec, outcome_name, sex_group) {
  if (outcome_name == "imaging") {
    if (sex_group == "All") {
      exp_spec$tert_imaging_overall
    } else if (sex_group == "M") {
      exp_spec$tert_imaging_M
    } else {
      exp_spec$tert_imaging_F
    }
  } else {  # admission
    if (sex_group == "All") {
      exp_spec$tert_admission_overall
    } else if (sex_group == "M") {
      exp_spec$tert_admission_M
    } else {
      exp_spec$tert_admission_F
    }
  }
}

#-------------------------------
# 4. Main CV loop
#-------------------------------

cv_auc_results_list <- list()
res_idx <- 1L

for (exp_name in names(exposure_specs)) {

  exp_spec <- exposure_specs[[exp_name]]
  dat_full <- exp_spec$data
  expo_var <- exp_spec$expo

  for (outcome_name in names(outcome_specs)) {

    surv_part <- outcome_specs[[outcome_name]]$surv
    time_var  <- outcome_specs[[outcome_name]]$time
    event_var <- outcome_specs[[outcome_name]]$event

    for (sex_group in sex_groups) {

      for (model_type in model_types) {

        #------------------------
        # 4a. Build dataset
        #------------------------
        if (model_type == "continuous") {

          if (sex_group == "All") {
            dat <- dat_full %>%
              dplyr::select(Sex, Age, all_of(expo_var), all_of(time_var), all_of(event_var)) %>%
              tidyr::drop_na()
          } else {
            dat <- dat_full %>%
              dplyr::filter(Sex == sex_group) %>%
              dplyr::select(Sex, Age, all_of(expo_var), all_of(time_var), all_of(event_var)) %>%
              tidyr::drop_na()
          }

        } else {  # tertiles

          tert_var <- get_tert_var(exp_spec, outcome_name, sex_group)

          # If tertile column not present, skip
          if (!tert_var %in% names(dat_full)) {
            warning(sprintf(
              "Skipping tertile model: exposure=%s, outcome=%s, sex_group=%s (column %s not found)",
              exp_name, outcome_name, sex_group, tert_var
            ))
            next
          }

          if (sex_group == "All") {
            dat <- dat_full %>%
              dplyr::select(Sex, Age, all_of(tert_var), all_of(time_var), all_of(event_var)) %>%
              tidyr::drop_na()
          } else {
            dat <- dat_full %>%
              dplyr::filter(Sex == sex_group) %>%
              dplyr::select(Sex, Age, all_of(tert_var), all_of(time_var), all_of(event_var)) %>%
              tidyr::drop_na()
          }
        }

        #------------------------
        # 4b. Skip if insufficient data
        #------------------------
        if (nrow(dat) == 0L || length(unique(dat[[event_var]])) < 2L) {
          next
        }

        #------------------------
        # 4c. Define Cox formula
        #------------------------
        if (model_type == "continuous") {

          if (sex_group == "All") {
            form_str <- sprintf("%s ~ %s*Sex + Age", surv_part, expo_var)
          } else {
            form_str <- sprintf("%s ~ %s + Age", surv_part, expo_var)
          }

        } else {  # tertiles

          if (sex_group == "All") {
            # overall tertiles: include Sex interaction
            form_str <- sprintf("%s ~ %s*Sex + Age", surv_part, tert_var)
          } else {
            # sex-specific tertiles: no Sex covariate
            form_str <- sprintf("%s ~ %s + Age", surv_part, tert_var)
          }
        }

        #------------------------
        # 4d. Create folds
        #------------------------
        k_use <- min(k, nrow(dat))
        folds <- createFolds(dat[[event_var]], k = k_use, list = TRUE)

        cv_risk <- numeric(nrow(dat))

        #------------------------
        # 4e. k-fold CV
        #------------------------
        for (i in seq_along(folds)) {

          test_idx  <- folds[[i]]
          train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(dat)), test_idx)

          train_fold <- dat[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
          test_fold  <- dat[test_idx,  , drop = FALSE]

          sfit <- coxph(
            as.formula(form_str),
            data = train_fold
          )

          cv_risk[test_idx] <- predict(
            sfit,
            newdata = test_fold,
            type = "lp"
          )
        }

        #------------------------
        # 4f. ROC / AUC + CI
        #------------------------
        roc_obj <- roc(
          response  = dat[[event_var]],
          predictor = cv_risk,
          quiet     = TRUE
        )

        auc_val <- as.numeric(auc(roc_obj))

        ci_num  <- as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_obj))  # c(lower, AUC, upper)
        auc_lcl <- ci_num
        auc_ucl <- ci_num

        #------------------------
        # 4g. Store ONE ROW per model
        #------------------------
        cv_auc_results_list[[res_idx]] <- data.frame(
          exposure   = exp_name,
          outcome    = outcome_name,
          sex_group  = sex_group,
          model_type = model_type,   # "continuous" or "tertiles"
          auc        = auc_val,
          auc_lcl    = auc_lcl,
          auc_ucl    = auc_ucl,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )

        res_idx <- res_idx + 1L
      }
    }
  }
}

cv_auc_results <- bind_rows(cv_auc_results_list)

processed_list <- lapply(cv_auc_results_list, function(df_i) {
  # Require at least 3 rows and 6 columns
  if (nrow(df_i) < 3 || ncol(df_i) < 6) return(NULL)

  # Take row 1, columns 1:6
  out <- df_i[1, 1:6, drop = FALSE]

  # Add auc_ucl from row 3, column 7
  out$auc_ucl <- df_i[3, 7]

  out
})

# Remove any NULLs and bind into final data frame
final_cv_auc_results <- bind_rows(processed_list)


#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#8.7.2 Plot ROC curves for WHR, PC2 and Spine BMFF 
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

library(pROC)

#Run the admission and imaging incident k-fold CV:ed models for spine BMFF, PC2 and WHR manually to create the plots below

PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(1,2,5:15)]) #imaging-incident
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(PC2_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(3:15)]) #admission-imaging

Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(1,2,5:15)]) #imaging-incident
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(Spine_T2D_cox_RCS_df[,c(3:15)]) #admission-imaging

WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(WHR_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,4,5,9,16,17,21)]) #imaging-incident
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1 = na.omit(WHR_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,4,5,7,19:21)]) #admission-imaging


set.seed(123)

train_data <- PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1
train_data <- Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1
train_data <- WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1

#Imaging

k <- 10
folds <- createFolds(train_data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox, k = k, list = TRUE)

# one out-of-sample prediction per training subject
cv_risk_train <- numeric(nrow(train_data))

for (i in seq_len(k)) {
  # fold i is the TEST portion within training
  test_indices_fold  <- folds[[i]]
  train_indices_fold <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(train_data)), test_indices_fold)
  
  train_fold <- train_data[train_indices_fold, ]
  test_fold  <- train_data[test_indices_fold, ]
  
  # Fit Cox model on this fold's training data
  sfit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, Imaging_incident_T2D_cox) ~ rt_WHR*Sex+Age,
    data = train_fold
  )
  
  # Predict risk on the held-out fold
  cv_risk_train[test_indices_fold] <- predict(
    sfit,
    newdata = test_fold,
    type = "lp"
  )
}

# Cross-validated ROC/AUC on the 80% training data
roc_cv_train_WHR <- roc(
  response  = train_data$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox,
  predictor = cv_risk_train,
  quiet     = TRUE
)

auc_cv_train <- auc(roc_cv_train_WHR)
auc_cv_train
ci_cv_train  <- ci.auc(roc_cv_train_WHR)
ci_cv_train

#Admission

k <- 10
folds <- createFolds(train_data$Admission_incident_T2D_cox, k = k, list = TRUE)

# one out-of-sample prediction per training subject
cv_risk_train <- numeric(nrow(train_data))

for (i in seq_len(k)) {
  # fold i is the TEST portion within training
  test_indices_fold  <- folds[[i]]
  train_indices_fold <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(train_data)), test_indices_fold)
  
  train_fold <- train_data[train_indices_fold, ]
  test_fold  <- train_data[test_indices_fold, ]
  
  # Fit Cox model on this fold's training data
  sfit <- coxph(
    Surv(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, Admission_incident_T2D_cox) ~ rt_WHR*Sex+Age,
    data = train_fold
  )
  
  # Predict risk on the held-out fold
  cv_risk_train[test_indices_fold] <- predict(
    sfit,
    newdata = test_fold,
    type = "lp"
  )
}

# Cross-validated ROC/AUC on the 80% training data
roc_cv_train_WHR <- roc(
  response  = train_data$Admission_incident_T2D_cox,
  predictor = cv_risk_train,
  quiet     = TRUE
)

auc_cv_train <- auc(roc_cv_train_WHR)
auc_cv_train
ci_cv_train  <- ci.auc(roc_cv_train_WHR)
ci_cv_train

# 1. Fit model and get ROC object (code above) - separately for spine and PC2
roc_test = roc_cv_train_spine
roc_test = roc_cv_train_PC2
roc_test = roc_cv_train_WHR

# 2. Compute 95% CI for sensitivity at each specificity (bootstrap) - I don't need this for the plot
#set.seed(123)
#ci_se <- ci.se(
#  roc_test,
#  boot.n = 2000,       # number of bootstrap samples: 2000 is default
#  conf.level = 0.95,
#  progress = "none"
#)

roc_df <- data.frame(
  specificity = roc_test$specificities,
  sensitivity = roc_test$sensitivities
)
roc_df$fpr <- 1 - roc_df$specificity  # false positive rate

roc_df_Spine_imaging = roc_df
roc_df_Spine_admission = roc_df

roc_df_PC2_imaging = roc_df
roc_df_PC2_admission = roc_df

roc_df_WHR_imaging = roc_df
roc_df_WHR_admission = roc_df


#Imaging-incident:
ggplot() +
  # PC2 ribbon curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_PC2_imaging,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "PC2"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  # Spine BMFF curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_Spine_imaging,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "Spine BMFF"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  # WHR curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_WHR_imaging,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "WHR"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1,
    intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey50"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity",
    color = "Predictor",
    fill  = "Predictor"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = "steelblue", "PC2" = "darkorange", "WHR" = '#8E4585'), 
                     labels = c("Spine BMFF" = "Spine BMFF\nAUC = 0.623 (0.599, 0.646)", "PC2" = "PC2\nAUC = 0.674 (0.649, 0.698)", "WHR" = "WHR\nAUC = 0.693 (0.673, 0.712)"))+
  theme(
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", lineheight = 1),
    legend.key.height = unit(2.5, "lines")
  )

#Admission-incident:
ggplot() +
  # PC2 ribbon curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_PC2_admission,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "PC2"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  # Spine BMFF curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_Spine_admission,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "Spine BMFF"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  # WHR curve
  geom_line(
    data = roc_df_WHR_admission,
    aes(x = fpr, y = sensitivity, color = "WHR"),
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1,
    intercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey50"
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Specificity",
    y = "Sensitivity",
    color = "Predictor",
    fill  = "Predictor"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Spine BMFF" = "steelblue", "PC2" = "darkorange", "WHR" = '#8E4585'), 
                     labels = c("Spine BMFF" = "Spine BMFF\nAUC = 0.657 (0.643, 0.669)", "PC2" = "PC2\nAUC = 0.713 (0.699, 0.726)", "WHR" = "WHR\nAUC = 0.728 (0.717, 0.738)"))+
  theme(
    axis.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", lineheight = 1),
    legend.key.height = unit(2.5, "lines")
  )
```

8.8 Compare predictive performances of additive models (i.e.,WHR vs WHR+spine BMFF, WHR vs WHR+PC2 and WHR+spine BMFF vs WHR+PC2) - AUCs and unapired DeLong tests forloop
```{r}
# --- Packages ---
# install.packages(c("survival", "pROC", "caret", "dplyr"))
library(survival)
library(pROC)
library(caret)
library(dplyr)

set.seed(123)

# --- Helpers to fix zero-row subsets and sex warnings ---

# Normalize Sex values to "M"/"F" regardless of coding ("Male"/"Female", 1/0, etc.)
normalize_sex <- function(x) {
  x_chr <- as.character(x)
  lx <- tolower(trimws(x_chr))
  out <- ifelse(lx %in% c("m", "male", "1"), "M",
         ifelse(lx %in% c("f", "female", "0", "2"), "F", NA_character_))
  factor(out, levels = c("M","F"))
}

# Subset by sex with robust normalization and drop unused levels
subset_by_sex <- function(df, sex = c("M","F")) {
  sex <- match.arg(sex)
  if (!"Sex" %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Sex column not found in the data frame. Please ensure 'Sex' exists before stratifying.")
  }
  df$Sex <- normalize_sex(df$Sex)
  df <- df[!is.na(df$Sex), , drop = FALSE]
  df <- df[df$Sex == sex, , drop = FALSE]
  droplevels(df)
}

# Build a Cox formula safely from a RHS string
build_surv_formula <- function(time_var, status_var, rhs_string) {
  if (is.null(rhs_string) || !is.character(rhs_string) || length(rhs_string) != 1L || !nzchar(rhs_string)) {
    stop("Formula RHS string is NULL/empty or invalid. Check make_formulas() and model mapping.")
  }
  stats::as.formula(sprintf("Surv(%s, %s) ~ %s", time_var, status_var, rhs_string))
}

# k-fold CV for Cox, with adaptive k to avoid "fewer rows than folds"
cv_cox_auc <- function(df, time_var, status_var, rhs_string, k = 10, seed = 123) {
  surv_form <- build_surv_formula(time_var, status_var, rhs_string)

  # Extract RHS vars only
  rhs_call <- stats::terms(surv_form)
  rhs_vars <- if (is.null(rhs_call)) character(0) else all.vars(rhs_call)
  vars_needed <- unique(c(rhs_vars, time_var, status_var))

  # Checks
  missing_vars <- setdiff(vars_needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Missing variables in data for formula '%s': %s",
                 rhs_string, paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", ")))
  }

  # Restrict and clean
  df <- df[, vars_needed, drop = FALSE]
  df <- stats::na.omit(df)
  n <- nrow(df)
  if (n < 2) stop("Not enough rows to run CV.")
  # Use an adaptive number of folds to avoid skipping when n < k
  k_use <- min(k, n)
  # At least 2 folds
  k_use <- max(2, k_use)

  set.seed(seed)
  folds <- createFolds(df[[status_var]], k = k_use, list = TRUE)

  cv_lp <- numeric(n)
  for (i in seq_len(k_use)) {
    test_idx  <- folds[[i]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), test_idx)
    train_fold <- df[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    test_fold  <- df[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]

    sfit <- coxph(surv_form, data = train_fold)
    cv_lp[test_idx] <- predict(sfit, newdata = test_fold, type = "lp")
  }

  roc_obj <- roc(response = df[[status_var]], predictor = cv_lp, quiet = TRUE)
  list(
    roc = roc_obj,
    auc = as.numeric(auc(roc_obj)),
    ci  = as.numeric(ci.auc(roc_obj)), # c(low, mid, high)
    lp  = cv_lp,
    n   = n,
    k   = k_use
  )
}

safe_roc_test <- function(roc1, roc2) {
  out <- try(roc.test(roc1, roc2, method = "delong"), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(out, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(out$p.value)
}

# Model RHS per group
make_formulas <- function(sex_term) {
  if (isTRUE(sex_term)) {
    list(
      WHR_base = "rt_WHR*Sex + Age",
      WHR_PC2  = "rt_WHR*Sex + Age + rt_PC2",
      WHR_BMFF = "rt_WHR*Sex + Age + rt_BMFF"
    )
  } else {
    list(
      WHR_base = "rt_WHR + Age",
      WHR_PC2  = "rt_WHR + Age + rt_PC2",
      WHR_BMFF = "rt_WHR + Age + rt_BMFF"
    )
  }
}

# --- Build input data frames and their male/female splits with robust Sex handling ---

# Source frames provided by you:
# WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident
# WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident
# WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident
# WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident
# WHR_imaging_incident_df

# Ensure Sex normalization in source frames (so subsetting won't yield zero rows due to coding)
normalize_sex_in_df <- function(df) {
  if ("Sex" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Sex <- normalize_sex(df$Sex)
    df <- df[!is.na(df$Sex), , drop = FALSE]
    df <- droplevels(df)
  }
  df
}

# PC2
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all     <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident)
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all   <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident)

PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M       <- subset_by_sex(PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "M")
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F       <- subset_by_sex(PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "F")
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M     <- subset_by_sex(PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "M")
PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F     <- subset_by_sex(PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "F")

# Spine BMFF
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all   <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident)
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident)

Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M     <- subset_by_sex(Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "M")
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F     <- subset_by_sex(Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "F")
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M   <- subset_by_sex(Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "M")
Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F   <- subset_by_sex(Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "F")

# WHR base (and splits)
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all     <- na.omit(WHR_imaging_incident_df[, c(1, 4, 5, 9, 16, 17, 21)])
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all     <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all)

WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M       <- subset_by_sex(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "M")
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F       <- subset_by_sex(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all, "F")

WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all   <- na.omit(WHR_imaging_incident_df[, c(1, 4, 5, 7, 19:21)])
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all   <- normalize_sex_in_df(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all)

WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M     <- subset_by_sex(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "M")
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F     <- subset_by_sex(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all, "F")

# --- Configuration ---

k <- 10

# Time/status per cohort
cohorts <- list(
  imaging = list(
    time   = "T2D_TOE_imaging_censor",
    status = "Imaging_incident_T2D_cox"
  ),
  admission = list(
    time   = "T2D_TOE_admission_censor",
    status = "Admission_incident_T2D_cox"
  )
)

# Map data frames per cohort, group, and model explicitly
data_by_model <- list(
  imaging = list(
    both = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_all
    ),
    male = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_M
    ),
    female = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_F
    )
  ),
  admission = list(
    both = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_all
    ),
    male = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_M
    ),
    female = list(
      WHR_base = WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F,
      WHR_PC2  = PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F,
      WHR_BMFF = Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_F
    )
  )
)

# Groups configuration: include Sex interaction only in 'both'
groups <- list(
  both   = list(sex_term = TRUE),
  male   = list(sex_term = FALSE),
  female = list(sex_term = FALSE)
)

# --- Run ---
results <- list()
auc_rows <- list()
delong_rows <- list()

for (cohort_name in names(cohorts)) {
  time_var   <- cohorts[[cohort_name]]$time
  status_var <- cohorts[[cohort_name]]$status

  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    sex_term <- groups[[group_name]]$sex_term
    forms <- make_formulas(sex_term)

    for (model_name in names(forms)) {
      df <- data_by_model[[cohort_name]][[group_name]][[model_name]]

      # Guard: if zero rows even after normalization, skip with informative message
      if (nrow(df) == 0) {
        warning(sprintf("No rows after sex normalization for %s | %s | %s. Check Sex coding in source data.",
                        cohort_name, group_name, model_name))
        next
      }

      fit <- cv_cox_auc(
        df          = df,
        time_var    = time_var,
        status_var  = status_var,
        rhs_string  = forms[[model_name]],
        k           = k,
        seed        = 123
      )

      # Store results
      results[[cohort_name]][[group_name]][[model_name]] <- fit

      auc_rows[[length(auc_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        cohort = cohort_name,
        group  = group_name,
        model  = model_name,
        AUC    = fit$auc,
        CI_low = fit$ci,
        CI_mid = fit$ci,
        CI_high= fit$ci,
        N      = fit$n,
        k_used = fit$k,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }

    # DeLong tests within cohort/group if all three models exist
    have <- names(results[[cohort_name]][[group_name]])
    if (all(c("WHR_base","WHR_PC2","WHR_BMFF") %in% have)) {
      roc_base <- results[[cohort_name]][[group_name]][["WHR_base"]]$roc
      roc_pc2  <- results[[cohort_name]][[group_name]][["WHR_PC2"]]$roc
      roc_bmff <- results[[cohort_name]][[group_name]][["WHR_BMFF"]]$roc

      delong_rows[[length(delong_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        cohort = cohort_name, group = group_name,
        comparison = "WHR_base vs WHR_PC2",
        p_value = safe_roc_test(roc_base, roc_pc2),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      delong_rows[[length(delong_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        cohort = cohort_name, group = group_name,
        comparison = "WHR_base vs WHR_BMFF",
        p_value = safe_roc_test(roc_base, roc_bmff),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      delong_rows[[length(delong_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        cohort = cohort_name, group = group_name,
        comparison = "WHR_PC2 vs WHR_BMFF",
        p_value = safe_roc_test(roc_pc2, roc_bmff),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
}

auc_table <- if (length(auc_rows)) bind_rows(auc_rows) else tibble()
delong_table <- if (length(delong_rows)) bind_rows(delong_rows) else tibble()

cat("AUCs and 95% CIs\n")
print(auc_table %>% arrange(cohort, group, model))

cat("\nDeLong comparisons\n")
print(delong_table %>% arrange(cohort, group, comparison))
```

8.9 Assess clinical re-classification metrics for WHR vs WHR+Spine BMFF and WHR vs WHR+PC2 Cox models
--> 8.9.1 Create data frames
--> 8.9.2 Run NRI and IDI calculation forloop
```{r}
#8.9.1 Create data frames

WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1 = WHR_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,21,4,5,16,17,19,20)]
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Sex <- ifelse(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Sex == "M", 1, 0) #re-code sex to 1 and 0
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox = ifelse(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Imaging_incident_T2D_cox == '2', 1,0) #re-code imaging incidence to 1 and 0
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Admission_incident_T2D_cox = ifelse(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1$Admission_incident_T2D_cox == '2', 1,0) #re-code admission incidence to 1 and 0
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident = na.omit(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1[,c(1:6)]) #imaging-incident
WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident = na.omit(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1[,c(1:4,7,8)]) #admission-imaging

#Merge WHR data frame with spine BMFF and PC2 data frames - paired test
WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident = merge(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident, Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid') #37,877
WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident %>%
  filter(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox == 1 & Sex==0) %>%
  summarise(max_time = max(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, na.rm = TRUE)) #2970 for both and males and 2600 for females

WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident = merge(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident, Model_adjusted_PC2_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,3)], by='eid')#38,841
WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident %>%
  filter(Admission_incident_T2D_cox == 1 & Sex==1) %>%
  summarise(max_time = max(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, na.rm = TRUE)) #5534 for both and males and 5355 for females

WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident = merge(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident, Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,45)], by='eid')#45,369
WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_imaging_incident %>%
  filter(Imaging_incident_T2D_cox == 1 & Sex==1) %>%
  summarise(max_time = max(T2D_TOE_imaging_censor, na.rm = TRUE)) #2970 for both and males and 2600 for females

WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident = merge(WHR_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident, Model_adjusted_Spine_imaging_incident_df[,c(1,45)], by='eid')#46,581
WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_admission_incident %>%
  filter(Admission_incident_T2D_cox == 1 & Sex==0) %>%
  summarise(max_time = max(T2D_TOE_admission_censor, na.rm = TRUE)) #5601 for both and males and 5355 for females

#8.9.2 Run NRI and IDI calculation forloop for WHR vs WHR+Spine BMFF and WHR vs WHR+PC2

#1) Load package
library(PredictABEL)

# 2) Define utility helpers

# Detect sex coding and subset accordingly:
subset_by_sex <- function(df, sex_group) {
  if (sex_group == "both") return(df)
  # Character/factor coding first
  if (is.character(df$Sex) || is.factor(df$Sex)) {
    s <- tolower(as.character(df$Sex))
    if (sex_group == "male")   return(dplyr::filter(df, s %in% c("m", "male", "1")))
    if (sex_group == "female") return(dplyr::filter(df, s %in% c("f", "female", "0")))
  }
  # Numeric coding
  sx <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df$Sex)))
  if (!all(is.na(sx))) {
    uniq <- sort(unique(stats::na.omit(sx)))
    male_code <- if (length(uniq) >= 2) max(uniq) else 1
    female_code <- if (length(uniq) >= 2) min(uniq) else 0
    if (sex_group == "male")   return(dplyr::filter(df, as.numeric(as.character(Sex)) == male_code))
    if (sex_group == "female") return(dplyr::filter(df, as.numeric(as.character(Sex)) == female_code))
  }
  df
}

# Build formulas depending on context and stratification
build_formulas <- function(context = c("imaging", "admission"),
                           sex_group = c("both", "male", "female"),
                           added_pred = c("rt_PC2", "rt_BMFF")) {
  context <- match.arg(context)
  sex_group <- match.arg(sex_group)
  added_pred <- match.arg(added_pred)

  time_var  <- if (context == "imaging") "T2D_TOE_imaging_censor"   else "T2D_TOE_admission_censor"
  event_var <- if (context == "imaging") "Imaging_incident_T2D_cox" else "Admission_incident_T2D_cox"

  if (sex_group == "both") {
    base_rhs <- "rt_WHR*Sex + Age"
    aug_rhs  <- paste0(base_rhs, " + ", added_pred)
  } else {
    base_rhs <- "rt_WHR + Age"                 # Remove Sex as a covariate in sex-stratified runs
    aug_rhs  <- paste0(base_rhs, " + ", added_pred)
  }

  f_base <- stats::as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", event_var, ") ~ ", base_rhs))
  f_aug  <- stats::as.formula(paste0("Surv(", time_var, ", ", event_var, ") ~ ", aug_rhs))
  list(base = f_base, aug = f_aug, time_var = time_var, event_var = event_var)
}

# Compute absolute risks at a specific time from a coxph fit
abs_risk_at <- function(fit, newdata, time_point) {
  sf <- survfit(fit, newdata = newdata)
  svals <- summary(sf, times = time_point)$surv
  as.numeric(1 - svals)
}

# Get the dataset for each combination
get_dataset <- function(model_family = c("PC2", "Spine"),
                        context = c("imaging", "admission")) {
  model_family <- match.arg(model_family)
  context <- match.arg(context)
  ds_name <- switch(model_family,
                    PC2   = paste0("WHR_PC2_T2D_cox_df_model1_", context, "_incident"),
                    Spine = paste0("WHR_Spine_T2D_cox_df_model1_", context, "_incident"))
  get(ds_name, inherits = TRUE)
}

# Robust scalar extractor to avoid zero-length vectors entering data.frame
scalarize <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(NA_real_)
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  x
}

# Try multiple known paths to continuous NRI/IDI; fall back to NA if not present
extract_cNRI <- function(rc) {
  candidates <- list(
    try(rc$NRI$`continuous.NRI`, silent = TRUE),
    try(rc$NRI$continuous.NRI, silent = TRUE),
    try(rc$NRI$NRI.continuous, silent = TRUE),
    try(rc$NRI$NRI, silent = TRUE) # sometimes a vector with multiple entries
  )
  for (cand in candidates) {
    if (!inherits(cand, "try-error")) return(scalarize(cand))
  }
  NA_real_
}
extract_IDI <- function(rc) {
  candidates <- list(
    try(rc$IDI$IDI, silent = TRUE),
    try(rc$IDI$`IDI.continuous`, silent = TRUE),
    try(rc$IDI, silent = TRUE)
  )
  for (cand in candidates) {
    if (!inherits(cand, "try-error")) return(scalarize(cand))
  }
  NA_real_
}

# 3) Time horizons to use (from your comments)
# Imaging: both/males = 2970; females = 2600 (for both PC2 and Spine)
# Admission: PC2 -> both/males = 5534; females = 5355
#            Spine -> both/males = 5601; females = 5355
time_horizon <- list(
  imaging = list(
    PC2   = c(both = 2970, male = 2970, female = 2600),
    Spine = c(both = 2970, male = 2970, female = 2600)
  ),
  admission = list(
    PC2   = c(both = 5534, male = 5534, female = 5355),
    Spine = c(both = 5601, male = 5601, female = 5355)
  )
)

# 4) Loop settings
contexts <- c("imaging", "admission")
sex_groups <- c("both", "male", "female")
model_families <- c("PC2", "Spine")
cutoff <- c(0, 0.4, 1)  # Arbitrary; continuous NRI/IDI also reported
cOutcome <- 6           # Outcome column index (as in your code)

# 5) Run the loop: fit Cox, predict risks, compute NRI/IDI
results <- list()
summary_rows <- list()
k <- 1

for (ctx in contexts) {
  for (mfam in model_families) {
    for (sexg in sex_groups) {

      # Get data and subset by sex if needed
      df <- get_dataset(model_family = mfam, context = ctx)
      df_sub <- subset_by_sex(df, sexg)

      # Skip if insufficient data
      if (nrow(df_sub) == 0) {
        warning(sprintf("No data for context=%s, model=%s, sex_group=%s; skipping.", ctx, mfam, sexg))
        next
      }

      # Build formulas
      added_pred <- if (mfam == "PC2") "rt_PC2" else "rt_BMFF"
      forms <- build_formulas(context = ctx, sex_group = sexg, added_pred = added_pred)

      # Fit Cox models
      fit_base <- coxph(forms$base, data = df_sub)
      fit_aug  <- coxph(forms$aug,  data = df_sub)

      # Time horizon for this combination
      t_pred <- time_horizon[[ctx]][[mfam]][[sexg]]

      # Predicted absolute risks at t_pred
      risk1 <- abs_risk_at(fit_base, newdata = df_sub, time_point = t_pred)
      risk2 <- abs_risk_at(fit_aug,  newdata = df_sub, time_point = t_pred)

      # Reclassification (continuous NRI/IDI available in output)
      rc <- reclassification(
        data = df_sub,
        cOutcome = cOutcome,
        predrisk1 = risk1,
        predrisk2 = risk2,
        cutoff = cutoff
      )

      # Store
      key <- paste(ctx, mfam, sexg, sep = "_")
      results[[key]] <- rc

      # Robust extraction to scalars to avoid differing row lengths
      cNRI_val <- extract_cNRI(rc)
      IDI_val  <- extract_IDI(rc)

      summary_rows[[k]] <- data.frame(
        context = ctx,
        model_pair = if (mfam == "PC2") "WHR vs WHR+PC2" else "WHR vs WHR+SpineBMFF",
        sex_group = sexg,
        time_used = t_pred,
        cNRI = cNRI_val,
        IDI = IDI_val,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      k <- k + 1

      message(sprintf("Done: %s | %s | %s (t=%s)", toupper(ctx), mfam, sexg, t_pred))
    }
  }
}

# 6) Summary table
summary_table <- dplyr::bind_rows(summary_rows)
print(summary_table)

```
